    declare ~tempo := 0.
    declare %_repetition_interval_time[4096] := (0)
    declare %_repetition_interval_time_humanization[4096] := (0)
    ~subarticulation_modulation_strength000 := real(ms_to_ticks(60000000)) / 960.
    if((~subarticulation_modulation_strength000 # 0.) or ($NI_CALLBACK_TYPE # $NI_CB_TYPE_LISTENER))
      $transition0 := 0
      $layer0 := 0
      $result7 := 0
      while($result7 <= 0) 
        $transition0 := 0
        while($transition0 <= 7) 
          $layer0 := 0
          while($layer0 <= 3) 
            if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($result7 * 32) + (($transition0 * 4) + $layer0)] >= 0)
              if((%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($result7 * 32) + (($transition0 * 4) + $layer0)]]] = 0) and (%_loaded_subarticulations_repetition_speed[($result7 * 32) + (($transition0 * 4) + $layer0)] > 0))
                %_repetition_interval_time[($result7 * 4096) + (($transition0 * 512) + $layer0)] := int((60000. / ~subarticulation_modulation_strength000) * (4. / real(%_loaded_subarticulations_repetition_speed[($result7 * 32) + (($transition0 * 4) + $layer0)])))
              end if
            end if
            inc($layer0)
          end while
          inc($transition0)
        end while
        inc($result7)
      end while
      ~tempo := ~subarticulation_modulation_strength000
    end if

    declare $_id
    declare %decode[2]
    make_persistent(%decode)
    read_persistent_var(%decode)
    declare @decode_path
    @_ret170 := "decode"
    $modulation_position0 := 81202
    @name2 := ""
    $fade_in_start0 := 4
    %decode[0] := -1
    @_ret1800 := ""
    $instrument10 := 0
    $s00 := load_array_str(%decode, get_folder($GET_FOLDER_PATCH_DIR) & @_ret1800 & "" & @_ret170 & ".nka")
    while((($s00 # -1) and ($instrument10 < $fade_in_start0)) and (%decode[0] # $modulation_position0)) 
      %decode[0] := -1
      @_ret1800 := @_ret1800 & "../"
      $s00 := load_array_str(%decode, get_folder($GET_FOLDER_PATCH_DIR) & @_ret1800 & @name2 & @_ret170 & ".nka")
      inc($instrument10)
    end while
    @_ret180 := get_folder($GET_FOLDER_PATCH_DIR) & @_ret1800 & @_ret170 & ".nka"
    @decode_path := @_ret180
    %decode[0] := -1
    $_id := load_array_str(%decode, @decode_path)
    declare %development[2]
    make_persistent(%development)
    read_persistent_var(%development)
    declare @development_path
    @_ret170 := "development"
    $modulation_position0 := 22714
    @name2 := ""
    $fade_in_start0 := 4
    %development[0] := -1
    @_ret1800 := ""
    $instrument10 := 0
    $s00 := load_array_str(%development, get_folder($GET_FOLDER_PATCH_DIR) & @_ret1800 & "" & @_ret170 & ".nka")
    while((($s00 # -1) and ($instrument10 < $fade_in_start0)) and (%development[0] # $modulation_position0)) 
      %development[0] := -1
      @_ret1800 := @_ret1800 & "../"
      $s00 := load_array_str(%development, get_folder($GET_FOLDER_PATCH_DIR) & @_ret1800 & @name2 & @_ret170 & ".nka")
      inc($instrument10)
    end while
    @_ret180 := get_folder($GET_FOLDER_PATCH_DIR) & @_ret1800 & @_ret170 & ".nka"
    @development_path := @_ret180
    if(abs(sh_right(abs(- sh_right(abs(%decode[0] - 81202) - 1, 31)) - 1, 31)) = 1)
      @development_path := get_folder($GET_FOLDER_PATCH_DIR) & "development.nka"
    end if
    %development[0] := -1
    $_id := load_array_str(%development, @development_path)
    declare @folder_path
    @folder_path := get_folder($GET_FOLDER_PATCH_DIR) & "../"
    if(abs(sh_right(abs(- sh_right(abs(%decode[0] - 81202) - 1, 31)) - 1, 31)) = 1)
      @folder_path := get_folder($GET_FOLDER_LIBRARY_DIR)
    end if
    declare @resources_path
    @resources_path := @folder_path & "Samples/<<<" & "lux-orchestral-strings" & ".nkr>>>/Resources/data/"
    declare @data_path
    @data_path := @folder_path & "Data/"
    declare @mixer_path
    @mixer_path := @folder_path & "mixer data/mix presets/"
    declare @articulations_path
    @articulations_path := @folder_path & "Articulations/"
    declare @articulation_sets_path
    @articulation_sets_path := @folder_path & "Articulation Sets/"
    $RETURN_FLAG100 := 0
    while($RETURN_FLAG100 = 0) 
      $idx30 := 0
      $RETURN_FLAG20 := 0
      while($RETURN_FLAG20 = 0) 
        if($nki_type = 0)
          $ret2 := $selected_instrument
          $RETURN_FLAG20 := 1
          continue
        end if
        $ret2 := %loaded_instrument_types[0]
        $RETURN_FLAG20 := 1
        continue
      end while
      $idx30 := $ret2
      if($idx30 # -1)
        @ret1 := !instrument_name[$idx30]
        $RETURN_FLAG100 := 1
        continue
      else
        @ret1 := "Unknown Instrument"
        $RETURN_FLAG100 := 1
        continue
      end if
    end while
    @path20 := @ret1
    declare @user_preset_path
    @user_preset_path := @folder_path & "User Data/" & @path20 & " Presets/"
    $RETURN_FLAG100 := 0
    while($RETURN_FLAG100 = 0) 
      $idx30 := 0
      $RETURN_FLAG20 := 0
      while($RETURN_FLAG20 = 0) 
        if($nki_type = 0)
          $ret2 := $selected_instrument
          $RETURN_FLAG20 := 1
          continue
        end if
        $ret2 := %loaded_instrument_types[0]
        $RETURN_FLAG20 := 1
        continue
      end while
      $idx30 := $ret2
      if($idx30 # -1)
        @ret1 := !instrument_name[$idx30]
        $RETURN_FLAG100 := 1
        continue
      else
        @ret1 := "Unknown Instrument"
        $RETURN_FLAG100 := 1
        continue
      end if
    end while
    @path20 := @ret1
    declare @preset_path
    @preset_path := @articulations_path & @path20 & " Articulations/"
    message("Preset Path: " & @preset_path)
    if(- sh_right(abs(%development[0] - 22714) - 1, 31) = 1)
      message("***** Script is in DEVELOPMENT Mode *****")
    else
      message("***** Script is in FINAL Mode *****")
    end if
    if(abs(sh_right(abs(- sh_right(abs(%decode[0] - 81202) - 1, 31)) - 1, 31)) = 1)
      message("***** Script is ENCODED *****")
    end if

    declare ui_label $lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope224 (0, 0)
    $_iter0 := 0
    while($_iter0 <= 224) 
      %lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[$_iter0] := get_ui_id($lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope0) + $_iter0
      inc($_iter0)
    end while
    $i := 0
    while($i <= (num_elements(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope) - 1)) 
      set_control_par_str(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "")
      set_control_par_str(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope")
      set_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_line), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + $i)
      set_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_line), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) - 50)
      set_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, 2)
      set_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, 50)
      set_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_PARENT_PANEL, get_ui_id($pnl_editor_page))
      set_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_Z_LAYER, 0)
      inc($i)
    end while
    declare ui_slider $sli_keyswitch_volume_curve_min (0, 127)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_keyswitch_volume_curve_min), $CONTROL_PAR_DEFAULT_VALUE, 0)
    set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($sli_keyswitch_volume_curve_min), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "knb_slider_curve_vertical_right")
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_keyswitch_volume_curve_min), $CONTROL_PAR_MOUSE_BEHAVIOUR, -2000)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_keyswitch_volume_curve_min), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_line), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - 10)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_keyswitch_volume_curve_min), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, (get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_line), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) - 36) - 12)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_keyswitch_volume_curve_min), $CONTROL_PAR_PARENT_PANEL, get_ui_id($pnl_editor_page))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_keyswitch_volume_curve_min), $CONTROL_PAR_Z_LAYER, 0)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_keyswitch_volume_curve_min), $CONTROL_PAR_ALLOW_AUTOMATION, 0)
    declare ui_slider $sli_keyswitch_volume_curve_max (0, 127)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_keyswitch_volume_curve_max), $CONTROL_PAR_DEFAULT_VALUE, 0)

    declare ui_button $btn_mixer_channel_disable_input4

    $i261000 := 0

        message("***************************** visibility: " & %subarticulations_visibility[$i261000])

      if(((%subarticulations_ids[$i261000] >= 0) and (%subarticulations_group_idx[$i261000] >= 0)) and (((%subarticulations_visibility[$i261000] = 3) or ((%subarticulations_visibility[$i261000] = 2) and ($nki_type = 0))) or ((%subarticulations_visibility[$i261000] = 1) and ($nki_type = 1))))
        %_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%subarticulations_instrument[$i261000] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + ((%type_to_category[%subarticulations_type[$i261000]] * 32) + %_category_counter0[((%subarticulations_instrument[$i261000] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 6) + %type_to_category[%subarticulations_type[$i261000]]])] := %subarticulations_ids[$i261000]
        %_category_counter0[((%subarticulations_instrument[$i261000] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 6) + %type_to_category[%subarticulations_type[$i261000]]] := %_category_counter0[((%subarticulations_instrument[$i261000] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 6) + %type_to_category[%subarticulations_type[$i261000]]] + 1
      end if
      inc($i261000)
    end while
    $instrument_slot4 := 0
    $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset := 0
    $selected_category := 0

        set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category[$keyswitch15], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
      else
        set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category[$keyswitch15], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
      end if
      inc($keyswitch15)
    end while
    $note15 := 0
    $keyswitch15 := 0
    while($keyswitch15 <= 31) 
      if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($instrument_slot4 * 32) + $keyswitch15)] # -1)
        if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($instrument_slot4 * 32) + $keyswitch15)] = %_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
          $note15 := $keyswitch15
        end if
      else
        $subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries := $keyswitch15
        $keyswitch15 := 32
      end if
      inc($keyswitch15)
    end while

      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, int(195. / (real($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries) / 8.)))
      $note15 := $note15 - (($note15 - ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8)) .and. sh_right(($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8) - $note15, 31))
    end if
    $subarticulation_browser_active_category := $instrument_slot4
    $subarticulation_event_id9 := $note15
    $subarticulation1 := 195 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT)
    $sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar := - (- ($subarticulation1 - (($subarticulation_event_id9 * $subarticulation1) / ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))) .and. sh_right(- ($subarticulation1 - (($subarticulation_event_id9 * $subarticulation1) / ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))), 31))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, 160 + ((abs($subarticulation1 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)) * (195 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT))) / $subarticulation1))
    $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset := (abs($subarticulation1 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)) * ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8)) / $subarticulation1
    $i := 0
    while($i <= (num_elements(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection) - 1)) 
      set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
      if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))] # -1)

    $lowest1 := 128
    $highest1 := 0
    $i6 := 0

      $RETURN_FLAG20 := 128
      $ret2 := 0
      $RETURN_FLAG200 := 0

          $RETURN_FLAG200 := 0

                $RETURN_FLAG20 := %subarticulations_range_lower[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($RETURN_FLAG100 * 32) + (($idx30 * 4) + $RETURN_FLAG200)]]] + (%subarticulations_octave_offset[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($RETURN_FLAG100 * 32) + (($idx30 * 4) + $RETURN_FLAG200)]]] * 12)
              end if
              if((%subarticulations_range_upper[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($RETURN_FLAG100 * 32) + (($idx30 * 4) + $RETURN_FLAG200)]]] + (%subarticulations_octave_offset[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($RETURN_FLAG100 * 32) + (($idx30 * 4) + $RETURN_FLAG200)]]] * 12)) > $ret2)
                $ret2 := %subarticulations_range_upper[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($RETURN_FLAG100 * 32) + (($idx30 * 4) + $RETURN_FLAG200)]]] + (%subarticulations_octave_offset[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($RETURN_FLAG100 * 32) + (($idx30 * 4) + $RETURN_FLAG200)]]] * 12)
              end if
            end if
            inc($RETURN_FLAG200)

        inc($idx30)
      end while
      %_instrument_range[$RETURN_FLAG100 * 2] := ($RETURN_FLAG20 - $range_offset_lower) - (%octave_shift[$RETURN_FLAG100] * 12)

      $lowest1 := $lowest1 - (($lowest1 - %_instrument_range[$i6 * 2]) .and. sh_right(%_instrument_range[$i6 * 2] - $lowest1, 31))
      $highest1 := $highest1 - (($highest1 - %_instrument_range[($i6 * 2) + 1]) .and. sh_right($highest1 - %_instrument_range[($i6 * 2) + 1], 31))

    %nki_range[0] := $lowest1 - (($lowest1 - ((($keyswitch_octave * 12) + 8) - 1)) .and. sh_right($lowest1 - ((($keyswitch_octave * 12) + 8) - 1), 31))
    %nki_range[1] := $highest1
    $instrument10 := 0

    $i := 0

        set_key_color(($keyswitch_octave * 12) + $i, $KEY_COLOR_ORANGE)

    $selected_subarticulation := 0

        set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_articulation_release), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_release[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch])
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_articulation_release_blocker), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
        set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($sli_articulation_release), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "knb_big")
        $btn_articulation_release := 0
      else
        set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_articulation_release), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "Release")
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_articulation_release_blocker), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
        set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($sli_articulation_release), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "knb_big_disabled")
        $btn_articulation_release := 1
      end if
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_keyswitch_volume_curve_min), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_keyswitch_volume_curve_max), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_keyswitch_volume_curve), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] * -1)
      $i := 0
      while($i <= (num_elements(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope) - 1)) 
        set_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, int(round(real(int((real(%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]) / 127.) * 50.)) + (real(int((real(%_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]) / 127.) * 50.) - int((real(%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]) / 127.) * 50.)) * pow(real($i) / real(num_elements(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope)), (real(%_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]) / 100.) + 1.)))))
        set_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_line), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) - get_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT))
        inc($i)
      end while
      if(((%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 5) and (%_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 127)) and (%_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 40))
        $mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve := 0
      else
        if(((%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 0) and (%_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 127)) and (%_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 40))
          $mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve := 1
        else
          if(((%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 5) and (%_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 127)) and (%_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 0))
            $mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve := 2
          else
            if(((%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 0) and (%_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 127)) and (%_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 0))
              $mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve := 3
            else
              if(((%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 127) and (%_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 127)) and (%_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 0))
                $mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve := 4
              else
                $mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve := 5
              end if
            end if
          end if
        end if
      end if
      $i311 := $selected_subarticulation
      $iii2 := 0
      while($iii2 <= (num_elements(%btn_edit_subarticulation_selection) - 1)) 
        if($iii2 # $i311)
          set_control_par(%btn_edit_subarticulation_selection[$iii2], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
        else
          set_control_par(%btn_edit_subarticulation_selection[$iii2], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
        end if
        inc($iii2)
      end while

        set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_parameters), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      end if
      if($selected_subarticulation >= 0)

          if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $i)] # -1)
            set_control_par_str(%btn_editor_overview[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "         " & !subarticulations_full_name[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $i)]]])
            set_control_par(%btn_editor_overview[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %fonts_regular_white[0])
          else
            set_control_par_str(%btn_editor_overview[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "         Empty")
            set_control_par(%btn_editor_overview[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %fonts_regular_white[6])
          end if
          inc($i)
        end while

      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_rr_mode_title), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)

      $i := 0
      while($i <= 3)

        ?xy_modwheel_assignment[2] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_start[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.

        ?xy_modwheel_assignment[4] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_end[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] - %_loaded_subarticulations_fade_out[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
        ?xy_modwheel_assignment[6] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_end[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.

      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_right), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))

          $subarticulation1 := 195 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT)
          $sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar := - (- ($subarticulation1 - (($subarticulation_event_id9 * $subarticulation1) / ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))) .and. sh_right(- ($subarticulation1 - (($subarticulation_event_id9 * $subarticulation1) / ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))), 31))
          set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, 160 + ((abs($subarticulation1 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)) * (195 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT))) / $subarticulation1))
          $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset := (abs($subarticulation1 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)) * ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8)) / $subarticulation1
          $i := 0
          while($i <= (num_elements(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection) - 1)) 
            set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)

function Preset______decr__
  $is_active0000 := $trigger_clear0000
  while($is_active0000 # -1) 
    $_ret20000 := 0
    %Preset____allocation[$is_active0000] := %Preset____allocation[$is_active0000] - $i26000
    if(%Preset____allocation[$is_active0000] > 0)
      $is_active0000 := -1
      continue
    else
      %Preset____allocation[$is_active0000] := 0
    end if
    $trigger_clear0000 := $is_active0000
    $is_active0000 := -1
    $is_active0 := %Preset____tags[$trigger_clear0000]
    $articulation_event_id2 := 1
    $ret18 := $is_active0
    while($ret18 # -1) 
      $string010 := 0
      %Floatmask____allocation[$ret18] := %Floatmask____allocation[$ret18] - $articulation_event_id2
      if(%Floatmask____allocation[$ret18] > 0)
        $ret18 := -1
        continue
      else
        %Floatmask____allocation[$ret18] := 0
      end if
      $is_active0 := $ret18
      $ret18 := -1
      $string010 := 0
      while($string010 <= 1) 
        $i360 := %_Floatmask____fm[($is_active0 * 2) + $string010]
        $string02 := 1
        $highest1 := $i360
        while($highest1 # -1) 
          $i2610 := 0
          %Bitlist____allocation[$highest1] := %Bitlist____allocation[$highest1] - $string02

function PresetBrowser__update_ks_selector
  $trigger_clear00000 := 0
  $subarticulation3 := 0
  while($subarticulation3 <= (num_elements(%btn_ks_selector) - 1)) 
    set_control_par(%btn_ks_selector[$subarticulation3], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
    set_control_par_str(%btn_ks_selector[$subarticulation3], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "")
    set_control_par(%btn_ks_selector[$subarticulation3], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, 16)
    if($subarticulation3 = $i2500000)
      if(%_keyswitch_preset[($selected_instrument * 8) + $subarticulation3] # -1)
        $trigger_clear0000 := %Browser____current[$browser]
        $i26000 := 1
        call Preset______decr__
        %Browser____current[$browser] := %_keyswitch_preset[($selected_instrument * 8) + $subarticulation3]
        $set_articulation_event_id00 := %Browser____current[$browser]
        $articulation_event_id50 := 1
        call Preset______incr__
      end if
      set_control_par_str(%btn_ks_selector[$subarticulation3], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !midi_note_names[$subarticulation3 + ($keyswitch_octave * 12)])
      set_control_par(%btn_ks_selector[$subarticulation3], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, 31)
      set_control_par(%btn_ks_selector[$subarticulation3], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
    end if
    set_control_par(%btn_ks_selector[$subarticulation3], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, $trigger_clear00000)
    $trigger_clear00000 := $trigger_clear00000 + (get_control_par(%btn_ks_selector[$subarticulation3], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH) + 2)
    inc($subarticulation3)
  end while
end function

function Floatmask____print
  @bl0 := "["
  $lowest00 := 0
  while($lowest00 < 64) 
    @bl0 := @bl0 & (sh_right(%Bitlist____val[%_Floatmask____fm[($highest1 * 2) + ($lowest00 / 32)]], (31 - $lowest00) mod 32) .and. 1)

      @bl0 := @bl0 & ", "
    end if
    inc($lowest00)
  end while
  @bl0 := @bl0 & "]"
  message(@bl0)
end function

function Browser____filter_presets

  while($_iter18 <= 1498) 
    %_Browser____filtered_presets[($_ret700 * 1499) + $_iter18] := -1
    inc($_iter18)
  end while

        $idx360 := $trigger_clear010
        $modulation0 := %Categories____tags[%Browser____categories[$_ret700]]
        $subarticulation_event_id1 := $idx360

        $result110 := $subarticulation_event_id2
        $ii40 := $result110
        $i370 := 1
        call Floatmask______incr__
        $is_active0 := $fade_out_range01
        $articulation_event_id2 := 1
        call Floatmask______decr__
        $fade_out_range01 := $result110
        $ii40 := $fade_out_range01
        $i370 := 1
        call Floatmask______incr__
        $is_active0 := $result110
        $articulation_event_id2 := 1

function Scrollarea__update_preset_button
  set_control_par_str(%_lbl_preset_name[($result600 * 9) + $i25030], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "           ")
  set_control_par_str(%_lbl_preset_name[($result600 * 9) + $i25030], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXTLINE, "           ")
  set_control_par_str(%_lbl_preset_name[($result600 * 9) + $i25030], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXTLINE, @name2)
  set_control_par(%_lbl_preset_name[($result600 * 9) + $i25030], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
  set_control_par_str(%_lbl_preset_info[($result600 * 9) + $i25030], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "")
  set_control_par(%_lbl_preset_info[($result600 * 9) + $i25030], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, 6)
  set_control_par(%_lbl_preset_info[($result600 * 9) + $i25030], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
end function
function Scrollarea__update_scroll_handle
  $is_free100 := 2
  $instrument10 := ((%Browser____num_shown_presets[$trigger_clear020] + 9) - 1) / 9
  $s00 := get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT)
  if($instrument10 > 2)
    $s00 := (get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) * $is_free100) / $instrument10
  end if
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_scrollhandle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, $s00)
  if($s00 < get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_scrollhandle), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + ((get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - $s00) - ((get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) * (get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT) - $s00)) / 1000000)))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_scrollhandle), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
  else
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_scrollhandle), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_scrollhandle), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  end if
end function
function Scrollarea__repaint
  $_ret330000 := $scroll__up
  $is_free1000 := 0
  while($is_free1000 < 2) 
    $i28000 := 0
    while($i28000 < 9) 
      $i250200 := 0
      if($_ret330000 < %Browser____num_shown_presets[$browser])
        $i250200 := 1
        $result600 := $is_free1000
        $i25030 := $i28000
        @name2 := !Preset____name[%_Browser____filtered_presets[($browser * 1499) + $_ret330000]]
        call Scrollarea__update_preset_button
        set_control_par(%_lbl_preset_info[($is_free1000 * 9) + $i28000], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, %Preset____icon[%_Browser____filtered_presets[($browser * 1499) + $_ret330000]])
        if($_ret330000 = $is_active01000)
          set_control_par(%_btn_preset[($is_free1000 * 9) + $i28000], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
          set_control_par(%_lbl_preset_name[($is_free1000 * 9) + $i28000], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %BrowserFont__preset[1])
          set_control_par_str(%_lbl_preset_info[($is_free1000 * 9) + $i28000], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, !articulation_icon_states[1])
        else
          set_control_par(%_btn_preset[($is_free1000 * 9) + $i28000], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
          set_control_par(%_lbl_preset_name[($is_free1000 * 9) + $i28000], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %BrowserFont__preset[0])
          set_control_par_str(%_lbl_preset_info[($is_free1000 * 9) + $i28000], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, !articulation_icon_states[0])
        end if
        set_control_par(%_btn_favorite[($is_free1000 * 9) + $i28000], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, sh_right(%Bitlist____val[%_Floatmask____fm[%Preset____tags[%_Browser____filtered_presets[($browser * 1499) + $_ret330000]] * 2]], 16) .and. 1)
      end if
      set_control_par(%_btn_preset[($is_free1000 * 9) + $i28000], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, %Utils__hide_state[$i250200])
      set_control_par(%_lbl_preset_name[($is_free1000 * 9) + $i28000], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, %Utils__hide_state[$i250200])
      set_control_par(%_lbl_preset_info[($is_free1000 * 9) + $i28000], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, %Utils__hide_state[$i250200])
      set_control_par(%_btn_favorite[($is_free1000 * 9) + $i28000], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, %Utils__hide_state[$i250200])
      inc($_ret330000)
      inc($i28000)
    end while
    inc($is_free1000)
  end while
  $trigger_clear020 := $browser
  call Scrollarea__update_scroll_handle
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_presetcount), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, %Browser____num_shown_presets[$browser] & "/" & %Browser____num_presets[$browser])
end function
function Scrollarea__update_position
  $ret2 := (1 + sh_right(abs(%Browser____num_shown_presets[$RETURN_FLAG100] mod 9) - 1, 31)) * 9
  $idx30 := (%Browser____num_shown_presets[$RETURN_FLAG100] - 18) + $ret2
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, (1000000 * ($idx30 - $scroll__up)) / $idx30)
  $is_active01000 := $RETURN_FLAG20
  call Scrollarea__repaint
end function
function Scrollarea__focus
  $_ret640 := $result63 / 9
  $_short_circuit50 := $scroll__up / 9
  $all_inactive0 := ($_short_circuit50 + 2) - 1
  $articulation_event_is_empty0 := $_short_circuit50
  if($_ret640 < $_short_circuit50)
    $articulation_event_is_empty0 := $_ret640
  else
    if($_ret640 > $all_inactive0)
      $articulation_event_is_empty0 := ($_ret640 - 2) + 1
    end if
  end if
  $ii6 := ((%Browser____num_shown_presets[$_ret650] + 9) - 1) / 9
  $i38 := 0
  if($ii6 > 2)
    $i38 := $ii6 - 2
  end if
  $articulation_event_is_empty0 := ($articulation_event_is_empty0 * (1 + (sh_right($i38 - $articulation_event_is_empty0, 31) .or. sh_right($articulation_event_is_empty0, 31)))) - ($i38 * sh_right($i38 - $articulation_event_is_empty0, 31))
  $scroll__up := $articulation_event_is_empty0 * 9
  $RETURN_FLAG100 := $_ret650
  $RETURN_FLAG20 := $result63
  call Scrollarea__update_position
end function

end function

function set_background_animation
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_bg_upper), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, $instrument10)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_bg_lower), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, $instrument10)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_keyswitch_label_cover), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, $instrument10)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_mixer_bg_upper), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, $instrument10)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_mixer_bg_lower), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, $instrument10)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_browser_bg_upper), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, $instrument10)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_browser_bg_lower), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, $instrument10)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_browser_overlay), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, $instrument10)
end function
function update_all_ranges
  $lowest1 := 128
  $highest1 := 0
  $i6 := 0
  while($i6 <= 0) 
    $RETURN_FLAG100 := $i6
    $RETURN_FLAG20 := 128
    $ret2 := 0
    $RETURN_FLAG200 := 0
    $idx30 := 0
    while($idx30 <= 7) 
      if(%_keyswitch_states[($RETURN_FLAG100 * 8) + $idx30] = 1)
        $RETURN_FLAG200 := 0
        while($RETURN_FLAG200 <= 3) 
          if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($RETURN_FLAG100 * 32) + (($idx30 * 4) + $RETURN_FLAG200)] >= 0)
            if((%subarticulations_range_lower[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($RETURN_FLAG100 * 32) + (($idx30 * 4) + $RETURN_FLAG200)]]] + (%subarticulations_octave_offset[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($RETURN_FLAG100 * 32) + (($idx30 * 4) + $RETURN_FLAG200)]]] * 12)) < $RETURN_FLAG20)
              $RETURN_FLAG20 := %subarticulations_range_lower[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($RETURN_FLAG100 * 32) + (($idx30 * 4) + $RETURN_FLAG200)]]] + (%subarticulations_octave_offset[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($RETURN_FLAG100 * 32) + (($idx30 * 4) + $RETURN_FLAG200)]]] * 12)
            end if
            if((%subarticulations_range_upper[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($RETURN_FLAG100 * 32) + (($idx30 * 4) + $RETURN_FLAG200)]]] + (%subarticulations_octave_offset[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($RETURN_FLAG100 * 32) + (($idx30 * 4) + $RETURN_FLAG200)]]] * 12)) > $ret2)
              $ret2 := %subarticulations_range_upper[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($RETURN_FLAG100 * 32) + (($idx30 * 4) + $RETURN_FLAG200)]]] + (%subarticulations_octave_offset[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($RETURN_FLAG100 * 32) + (($idx30 * 4) + $RETURN_FLAG200)]]] * 12)
            end if
          end if
          inc($RETURN_FLAG200)
        end while
      end if
      inc($idx30)
    end while
    %_instrument_range[$RETURN_FLAG100 * 2] := ($RETURN_FLAG20 - $range_offset_lower) - (%octave_shift[$RETURN_FLAG100] * 12)
    %_instrument_range[($RETURN_FLAG100 * 2) + 1] := ($ret2 + $range_offset_upper) - (%octave_shift[$RETURN_FLAG100] * 12)
    $lowest1 := $lowest1 - (($lowest1 - %_instrument_range[$i6 * 2]) .and. sh_right(%_instrument_range[$i6 * 2] - $lowest1, 31))
    $highest1 := $highest1 - (($highest1 - %_instrument_range[($i6 * 2) + 1]) .and. sh_right($highest1 - %_instrument_range[($i6 * 2) + 1], 31))
    inc($i6)
  end while
  %nki_range[0] := $lowest1 - (($lowest1 - ((($keyswitch_octave * 12) + 8) - 1)) .and. sh_right($lowest1 - ((($keyswitch_octave * 12) + 8) - 1), 31))
  %nki_range[1] := $highest1
  $instrument10 := 0
  while($instrument10 <= 127) 
    set_key_color($instrument10, $KEY_COLOR_INACTIVE)
    if(($instrument10 >= %nki_range[0]) and ($instrument10 <= %nki_range[1]))
      set_key_color($instrument10, $KEY_COLOR_BLUE)
    end if
    inc($instrument10)
  end while
  $i := 0
  while($i <= 7) 
    set_key_color(($keyswitch_octave * 12) + $i, $KEY_COLOR_RED)
    if(%_keyswitch_states[($selected_instrument * 8) + $i] = 1)
      set_key_color(($keyswitch_octave * 12) + $i, $KEY_COLOR_ORANGE)
    end if
    inc($i)
  end while
end function
function articulation_update_minimal_delay
  %_articulation_minimal_delay[($min5 * 8) + $idx38] := 0
  $transition_type1 := 0
  while($transition_type1 <= 3) 
    if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($min5 * 32) + (($idx38 * 4) + $transition_type1)] # -1)
      if(%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($min5 * 32) + (($idx38 * 4) + $transition_type1)]]] = 2)
        %_articulation_minimal_delay[($min5 * 8) + $idx38] := %_articulation_minimal_delay[($min5 * 8) + $idx38] - ((%_articulation_minimal_delay[($min5 * 8) + $idx38] - $lookahead) .and. sh_right(%_articulation_minimal_delay[($min5 * 8) + $idx38] - $lookahead, 31))
      else
        %_articulation_minimal_delay[($min5 * 8) + $idx38] := %_articulation_minimal_delay[($min5 * 8) + $idx38] - ((%_articulation_minimal_delay[($min5 * 8) + $idx38] - %subarticulations_start_offset[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($min5 * 32) + (($idx38 * 4) + $transition_type1)]]]) .and. sh_right(%_articulation_minimal_delay[($min5 * 8) + $idx38] - %subarticulations_start_offset[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($min5 * 32) + (($idx38 * 4) + $transition_type1)]]], 31))
      end if
    end if
    inc($transition_type1)
  end while
end function
function update_minimal_delays
  $subarticulation_idx2 := 0
  $note4 := 0
  while($note4 <= 0) 
    $subarticulation_idx2 := 0
    while($subarticulation_idx2 <= 7) 
      $min5 := $note4
      $idx38 := $subarticulation_idx2
      call articulation_update_minimal_delay
      inc($subarticulation_idx2)
    end while
    inc($note4)
  end while
end function
function get_currently_opened_ks_instrument_name
  $RETURN_FLAG100 := 0
  while($RETURN_FLAG100 = 0) 
    $idx30 := 0
    $RETURN_FLAG20 := 0
    while($RETURN_FLAG20 = 0) 
      if($nki_type = 0)
        $ret2 := $selected_instrument
        $RETURN_FLAG20 := 1
        continue
      end if
      $ret2 := %loaded_instrument_types[0]
      $RETURN_FLAG20 := 1
      continue
    end while
    $idx30 := $ret2
    if($idx30 # -1)
      @ret1 := !instrument_name[$idx30]
      $RETURN_FLAG100 := 1
      continue
    else
      @ret1 := "Unknown Instrument"
      $RETURN_FLAG100 := 1
      continue
    end if
  end while
end function
function choose_mode
  $use_constant_delay := $instrument10
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_choose_mode), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, $instrument10)
  if($use_constant_delay = 1)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_choose_mode_live), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %font_label_small[0])
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_choose_mode_lookahead), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %font_label_small[1])
  else
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_choose_mode_live), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %font_label_small[1])
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_choose_mode_lookahead), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %font_label_small[0])
  end if
end function
function update_instrument_selector_menu
  $subarticulation0 := 0
  while($subarticulation0 <= 0) 
    set_menu_item_str($mnu_instrument_selector, $subarticulation0, !instrument_name[%loaded_instrument_types[$subarticulation0]])
    inc($subarticulation0)
  end while
end function
function set_modulation_position
  %modulation_positions[$reduced_note0000] := $string0000
end function
function dev_keys__update_preset_paths
  call get_currently_opened_ks_instrument_name
  @_ret170 := @ret1
  @user_preset_path := @folder_path & "User Data/" & @_ret170 & " Presets/"
  call get_currently_opened_ks_instrument_name
  @_ret180 := @ret1
  @preset_path := @articulations_path & @_ret180 & " Articulations/"
end function
function update_keyswitch_selection
  $instrument1 := 0
  while($instrument1 < 8) 
    set_control_par(%swi_keyswitch[$instrument1], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_keyswitch_states[($selected_instrument * 8) + $instrument1])
    set_control_par_str(%lbl_keyswitch_note_name[$instrument1], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !midi_note_names[$instrument1 + ($keyswitch_octave * 12)])
    set_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_note_name[$instrument1], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %font_label_small[(6 * abs(sh_right(abs(%_keyswitch_purge_states[($selected_instrument * 8) + $instrument1]) - 1, 31))) + (%_keyswitch_purge_states[($selected_instrument * 8) + $instrument1] * %_keyswitch_states[($selected_instrument * 8) + $instrument1])])
    set_control_par_str(%lbl_keyswitch[$instrument1], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "          ")
    set_control_par_str(%lbl_keyswitch[$instrument1], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXTLINE, "          ")
    set_control_par_str(%lbl_keyswitch[$instrument1], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXTLINE, !_articulation_names[($selected_instrument * 8) + $instrument1])
    set_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch[$instrument1], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %font_label_small[(6 * abs(sh_right(abs(%_keyswitch_purge_states[($selected_instrument * 8) + $instrument1]) - 1, 31))) + (%_keyswitch_purge_states[($selected_instrument * 8) + $instrument1] * %_keyswitch_states[($selected_instrument * 8) + $instrument1])])
    $_ret7001 := $instrument1
    set_control_par_str(%lbl_keyswitch_icon[$_ret7001], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, !articulation_icon_states[(2 * abs(sh_right(abs(%_keyswitch_purge_states[($selected_instrument * 8) + $_ret7001]) - 1, 31))) + (%_keyswitch_purge_states[($selected_instrument * 8) + $_ret7001] * %_keyswitch_states[($selected_instrument * 8) + $_ret7001])])
    set_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_icon[$_ret7001], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, %_articulation_icon[($selected_instrument * 8) + $_ret7001])
    set_control_par(%swi_keyswitch_purge[$instrument1], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_keyswitch_purge_states[($selected_instrument * 8) + $instrument1])
    set_key_pressed(($keyswitch_octave * 12) + $instrument1, %_keyswitch_states[($selected_instrument * 8) + $instrument1] * abs(sh_right(abs(- sh_right(abs($nki_type - 2) - 1, 31)) - 1, 31)))
    inc($instrument1)
  end while
  $lowest1 := 128
  $highest1 := 0
  $i6 := 0
  while($i6 <= 0) 
    $RETURN_FLAG100 := $i6
    $RETURN_FLAG20 := 128
    $ret2 := 0
    $RETURN_FLAG200 := 0
    $idx30 := 0
    while($idx30 <= 7) 
      if(%_keyswitch_states[($RETURN_FLAG100 * 8) + $idx30] = 1)
        $RETURN_FLAG200 := 0
        while($RETURN_FLAG200 <= 3) 
          if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($RETURN_FLAG100 * 32) + (($idx30 * 4) + $RETURN_FLAG200)] >= 0)
            if((%subarticulations_range_lower[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($RETURN_FLAG100 * 32) + (($idx30 * 4) + $RETURN_FLAG200)]]] + (%subarticulations_octave_offset[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($RETURN_FLAG100 * 32) + (($idx30 * 4) + $RETURN_FLAG200)]]] * 12)) < $RETURN_FLAG20)
              $RETURN_FLAG20 := %subarticulations_range_lower[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($RETURN_FLAG100 * 32) + (($idx30 * 4) + $RETURN_FLAG200)]]] + (%subarticulations_octave_offset[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($RETURN_FLAG100 * 32) + (($idx30 * 4) + $RETURN_FLAG200)]]] * 12)
            end if
            if((%subarticulations_range_upper[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($RETURN_FLAG100 * 32) + (($idx30 * 4) + $RETURN_FLAG200)]]] + (%subarticulations_octave_offset[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($RETURN_FLAG100 * 32) + (($idx30 * 4) + $RETURN_FLAG200)]]] * 12)) > $ret2)
              $ret2 := %subarticulations_range_upper[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($RETURN_FLAG100 * 32) + (($idx30 * 4) + $RETURN_FLAG200)]]] + (%subarticulations_octave_offset[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($RETURN_FLAG100 * 32) + (($idx30 * 4) + $RETURN_FLAG200)]]] * 12)
            end if
          end if
          inc($RETURN_FLAG200)
        end while
      end if
      inc($idx30)
    end while
    %_instrument_range[$RETURN_FLAG100 * 2] := ($RETURN_FLAG20 - $range_offset_lower) - (%octave_shift[$RETURN_FLAG100] * 12)
    %_instrument_range[($RETURN_FLAG100 * 2) + 1] := ($ret2 + $range_offset_upper) - (%octave_shift[$RETURN_FLAG100] * 12)
    $lowest1 := $lowest1 - (($lowest1 - %_instrument_range[$i6 * 2]) .and. sh_right(%_instrument_range[$i6 * 2] - $lowest1, 31))
    $highest1 := $highest1 - (($highest1 - %_instrument_range[($i6 * 2) + 1]) .and. sh_right($highest1 - %_instrument_range[($i6 * 2) + 1], 31))
    inc($i6)
  end while
  %nki_range[0] := $lowest1 - (($lowest1 - ((($keyswitch_octave * 12) + 8) - 1)) .and. sh_right($lowest1 - ((($keyswitch_octave * 12) + 8) - 1), 31))
  %nki_range[1] := $highest1
  $instrument10 := 0
  while($instrument10 <= 127) 
    set_key_color($instrument10, $KEY_COLOR_INACTIVE)
    if(($instrument10 >= %nki_range[0]) and ($instrument10 <= %nki_range[1]))
      set_key_color($instrument10, $KEY_COLOR_BLUE)
    end if
    inc($instrument10)
  end while
  $i := 0
  while($i <= 7) 
    set_key_color(($keyswitch_octave * 12) + $i, $KEY_COLOR_RED)
    if(%_keyswitch_states[($selected_instrument * 8) + $i] = 1)
      set_key_color(($keyswitch_octave * 12) + $i, $KEY_COLOR_ORANGE)
    end if
    inc($i)
  end while
  $selected_subarticulation := 0
  if(get_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_page), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) = $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_page), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    if($nki_type # 0)
      set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_bg_upper), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "bg_upper_editor")
    end if
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_keyswitch_velocity_to_modwheel), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_mw_to_velocity[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch])
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_articulation_humanize), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_humanization[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch])
    if(%_articulation_release[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] >= 0)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_articulation_release), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_release[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_articulation_release_blocker), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
      set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($sli_articulation_release), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "knb_big")
      $btn_articulation_release := 0
    else
      set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_articulation_release), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "Release")
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_articulation_release_blocker), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($sli_articulation_release), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "knb_big_disabled")
      $btn_articulation_release := 1
    end if
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_keyswitch_volume_curve_min), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch])
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_keyswitch_volume_curve_max), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch])
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_keyswitch_volume_curve), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] * -1)
    $i := 0
    while($i <= (num_elements(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope) - 1)) 
      set_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, int(round(real(int((real(%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]) / 127.) * 50.)) + (real(int((real(%_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]) / 127.) * 50.) - int((real(%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]) / 127.) * 50.)) * pow(real($i) / real(num_elements(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope)), (real(%_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]) / 100.) + 1.)))))
      set_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_line), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) - get_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT))
      inc($i)
    end while
    if(((%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 5) and (%_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 127)) and (%_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 40))
      $mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve := 0
    else
      if(((%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 0) and (%_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 127)) and (%_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 40))
        $mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve := 1
      else
        if(((%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 5) and (%_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 127)) and (%_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 0))
          $mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve := 2
        else
          if(((%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 0) and (%_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 127)) and (%_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 0))
            $mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve := 3
          else
            if(((%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 127) and (%_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 127)) and (%_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 0))
              $mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve := 4
            else
              $mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve := 5
            end if
          end if
        end if
      end if
    end if
    $i311 := $selected_subarticulation
    $iii2 := 0
    while($iii2 <= (num_elements(%btn_edit_subarticulation_selection) - 1)) 
      if($iii2 # $i311)
        set_control_par(%btn_edit_subarticulation_selection[$iii2], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
      else
        set_control_par(%btn_edit_subarticulation_selection[$iii2], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
      end if
      inc($iii2)
    end while
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_overview), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    if(get_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) = $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_parameters), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    end if
    if($selected_subarticulation >= 0)
      $displayed_subarticulation := $selected_subarticulation
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_edit_subarticulation_selection_all), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
      if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] # -1)
        set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_title), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "    " & !subarticulations_full_name[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]]])
      else
        set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_title), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "    Empty")
      end if
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_solo_subarticulation), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_subarticulations_solo_states[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_mute_subarticulation), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_subarticulations_mute_states[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_layer_selection), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, $selected_subarticulation)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_volume), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_loaded_subarticulations_volume[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
    else
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_edit_subarticulation_selection_all), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_layer_selection), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, 4)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_parameters), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_overview), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      $i := 0
      while($i <= (num_elements(%btn_editor_overview) - 1)) 
        if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $i)] # -1)
          set_control_par_str(%btn_editor_overview[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "         " & !subarticulations_full_name[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $i)]]])
          set_control_par(%btn_editor_overview[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %fonts_regular_white[0])
        else
          set_control_par_str(%btn_editor_overview[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "         Empty")
          set_control_par(%btn_editor_overview[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %fonts_regular_white[6])
        end if
        inc($i)
      end while
    end if
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_tightness), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_tightness), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($mnu_subarticulation_repetition_speed), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_repetition_speed_title), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($mnu_subarticulation_rr_mode), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_rr_mode_title), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_trans_volume), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_trans_volume), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_trans_speed), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_trans_speed), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_trans_speed), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_trans_speed_blocker), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    if($selected_subarticulation >= 0)
      if((%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]]] = 0) or (%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]]] = 5))
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_tightness), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_loaded_subarticulations_tightness[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_tightness), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_tightness), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
        $mnu_subarticulation_rr_mode := %_loaded_subarticulations_rr_mode[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($mnu_subarticulation_rr_mode), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_rr_mode_title), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      end if
      if(((%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]]] = 0) or (%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]]] = 5)) or (%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]]] = 9))
        $mnu_subarticulation_repetition_speed := %_loaded_subarticulations_repetition_speed[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($mnu_subarticulation_repetition_speed), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_repetition_speed_title), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      end if
      if((%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]]] = 2) or (%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]]] = 9))
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_trans_volume), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_loaded_subarticulations_trans_volume[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_trans_volume), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_trans_volume), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_trans_speed), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_loaded_subarticulations_trans_speed[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_trans_speed), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_trans_speed), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
        $btn_subarticulation_trans_speed := %_loaded_subarticulations_trans_speed_auto[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_trans_speed), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
        if($btn_subarticulation_trans_speed = 1)
