      inc($i)
    end while
    if($selected_subarticulation >= 0)
      ?xy_modwheel_assignment[2] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_start[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
      ?xy_modwheel_assignment[0] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_start[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] + %_loaded_subarticulations_fade_in[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
      ?xy_modwheel_assignment[4] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_end[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] - %_loaded_subarticulations_fade_out[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
      ?xy_modwheel_assignment[6] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_end[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_constant), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int((?xy_modwheel_assignment[0] - ?xy_modwheel_assignment[2]) * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH))))
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_constant), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, int((?xy_modwheel_assignment[4] - ?xy_modwheel_assignment[0]) * 225.))
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int(?xy_modwheel_assignment[2] * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH))))
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_left_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - 10)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_fade_in), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_constant), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - 225)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_fade_in), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, int((?xy_modwheel_assignment[0] - ?xy_modwheel_assignment[2]) * 224.))
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_fade_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_constant), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_constant), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH))
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_fade_out), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, int((?xy_modwheel_assignment[6] - ?xy_modwheel_assignment[4]) * 224.))
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_right), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int(?xy_modwheel_assignment[6] * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)))) - 1)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_right_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_right), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 1)
    end if
    ?xy_dynamic_range[0] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_lower[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
    ?xy_dynamic_range[2] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_upper[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int(?xy_dynamic_range[0] * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH))))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - 10)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_right), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int(?xy_dynamic_range[2] * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)))) - 1)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_right_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_right), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 1)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_right), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
    $idx37 := int((real(%modulation_positions[0]) * (1. - (real($polyphonic_modulation_percentage) / 100.))) + ((real(%modulation_positions[0]) * real($polyphonic_modulation_percentage)) / 100.))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_cursor), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - 1) + int((real((($idx37 * (1 + (sh_right(127 - $idx37, 31) .or. sh_right($idx37 - 1, 31)))) - sh_right($idx37 - 1, 31)) - (127 * sh_right(127 - $idx37, 31))) / 127.) * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_right), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))))
    if(get_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) = $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_parameters), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_overview), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browse), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
      set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browse), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "btn_back")
      $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset := 0
      if($selected_subarticulation < 0)
        $selected_subarticulation := 0
        $btn_edit_subarticulation_selection_all := 0
        $i311 := 0
        $iii2 := 0
        while($iii2 <= (num_elements(%btn_edit_subarticulation_selection) - 1)) 
          if($iii2 # $i311)
            set_control_par(%btn_edit_subarticulation_selection[$iii2], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
          else
            set_control_par(%btn_edit_subarticulation_selection[$iii2], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
          end if
          inc($iii2)
        end while
      end if
      if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] # -1)
        $instrument_slot4 := %type_to_category[%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]]]]
        $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset := 0
        $selected_category := $instrument_slot4
        $keyswitch15 := 0
        while($keyswitch15 <= (num_elements(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category) - 1)) 
          if($keyswitch15 = $instrument_slot4)
            set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category[$keyswitch15], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
          else
            set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category[$keyswitch15], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
          end if
          inc($keyswitch15)
        end while
        $note15 := 0
        $keyswitch15 := 0
        while($keyswitch15 <= 31) 
          if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($instrument_slot4 * 32) + $keyswitch15)] # -1)
            if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($instrument_slot4 * 32) + $keyswitch15)] = %_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
              $note15 := $keyswitch15
            end if
          else
            $subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries := $keyswitch15
            $keyswitch15 := 32
          end if
          inc($keyswitch15)
        end while
        message("selected_idx: " & $note15 & ", subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries: " & ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))
        if($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries <= 8)
          set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
          $note15 := 0
        else
          set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
          set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, int(195. / (real($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries) / 8.)))
          $note15 := $note15 - (($note15 - ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8)) .and. sh_right(($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8) - $note15, 31))
        end if
        $subarticulation_browser_active_category := $instrument_slot4
        $subarticulation_event_id9 := $note15
        $subarticulation1 := 195 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT)
        $sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar := - (- ($subarticulation1 - (($subarticulation_event_id9 * $subarticulation1) / ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))) .and. sh_right(- ($subarticulation1 - (($subarticulation_event_id9 * $subarticulation1) / ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))), 31))
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, 160 + ((abs($subarticulation1 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)) * (195 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT))) / $subarticulation1))
        $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset := (abs($subarticulation1 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)) * ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8)) / $subarticulation1
        $i := 0
        while($i <= (num_elements(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection) - 1)) 
          set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
          if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))] # -1)
            set_control_par_str(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !subarticulations_full_name[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))]]])
            if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))] = %_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
              set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
            else
              set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
            end if
            set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
          end if
          inc($i)
        end while
        message("set scroll slider: " & $note15)
        if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] = -1)
          set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browser_empty), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
        else
          set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browser_empty), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
        end if
      else
        $instrument_slot4 := 0
        $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset := 0
        $selected_category := 0
        $keyswitch15 := 0
        while($keyswitch15 <= (num_elements(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category) - 1)) 
          if($keyswitch15 = $instrument_slot4)
            set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category[$keyswitch15], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
          else
            set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category[$keyswitch15], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
          end if
          inc($keyswitch15)
        end while
        $note15 := 0
        $keyswitch15 := 0
        while($keyswitch15 <= 31) 
          if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($instrument_slot4 * 32) + $keyswitch15)] # -1)
            if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($instrument_slot4 * 32) + $keyswitch15)] = %_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
              $note15 := $keyswitch15
            end if
          else
            $subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries := $keyswitch15
            $keyswitch15 := 32
          end if
          inc($keyswitch15)
        end while
        message("selected_idx: " & $note15 & ", subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries: " & ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))
        if($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries <= 8)
          set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
          $note15 := 0
        else
          set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
          set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, int(195. / (real($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries) / 8.)))
          $note15 := $note15 - (($note15 - ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8)) .and. sh_right(($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8) - $note15, 31))
        end if
        $subarticulation_browser_active_category := $instrument_slot4
        $subarticulation_event_id9 := $note15
        $subarticulation1 := 195 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT)
        $sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar := - (- ($subarticulation1 - (($subarticulation_event_id9 * $subarticulation1) / ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))) .and. sh_right(- ($subarticulation1 - (($subarticulation_event_id9 * $subarticulation1) / ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))), 31))
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, 160 + ((abs($subarticulation1 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)) * (195 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT))) / $subarticulation1))
        $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset := (abs($subarticulation1 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)) * ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8)) / $subarticulation1
        $i := 0
        while($i <= (num_elements(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection) - 1)) 
          set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
          if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))] # -1)
            set_control_par_str(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !subarticulations_full_name[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))]]])
            if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))] = %_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
              set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
            else
              set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
            end if
            set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
          end if
          inc($i)
        end while
        message("set scroll slider: " & $note15)
        if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] = -1)
          set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browser_empty), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
        else
          set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browser_empty), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
        end if
      end if
    end if
  end if
end function
function editor_page_open
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_page), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
  if($nki_type # 0)
    set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_bg_upper), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "bg_upper_editor")
  end if
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_keyswitch_velocity_to_modwheel), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_mw_to_velocity[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_articulation_humanize), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_humanization[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch])
  if(%_articulation_release[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] >= 0)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_articulation_release), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_release[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch])
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_articulation_release_blocker), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($sli_articulation_release), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "knb_big")
    $btn_articulation_release := 0
  else
    set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_articulation_release), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "Release")
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_articulation_release_blocker), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($sli_articulation_release), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "knb_big_disabled")
    $btn_articulation_release := 1
  end if
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_keyswitch_volume_curve_min), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_keyswitch_volume_curve_max), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_keyswitch_volume_curve), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] * -1)
  $i := 0
  while($i <= (num_elements(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope) - 1)) 
    set_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, int(round(real(int((real(%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]) / 127.) * 50.)) + (real(int((real(%_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]) / 127.) * 50.) - int((real(%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]) / 127.) * 50.)) * pow(real($i) / real(num_elements(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope)), (real(%_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]) / 100.) + 1.)))))
    set_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_line), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) - get_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT))
    inc($i)
  end while
  if(((%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 5) and (%_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 127)) and (%_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 40))
    $mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve := 0
  else
    if(((%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 0) and (%_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 127)) and (%_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 40))
      $mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve := 1
    else
      if(((%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 5) and (%_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 127)) and (%_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 0))
        $mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve := 2
      else
        if(((%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 0) and (%_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 127)) and (%_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 0))
          $mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve := 3
        else
          if(((%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 127) and (%_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 127)) and (%_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 0))
            $mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve := 4
          else
            $mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve := 5
          end if
        end if
      end if
    end if
  end if
  $i311 := $selected_subarticulation
  $iii2 := 0
  while($iii2 <= (num_elements(%btn_edit_subarticulation_selection) - 1)) 
    if($iii2 # $i311)
      set_control_par(%btn_edit_subarticulation_selection[$iii2], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
    else
      set_control_par(%btn_edit_subarticulation_selection[$iii2], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
    end if
    inc($iii2)
  end while
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_overview), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  if(get_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) = $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_parameters), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
  end if
  if($selected_subarticulation >= 0)

  $i := 0
  while($i <= 3)

    ?xy_modwheel_assignment[2] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_start[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.

  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_right), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))

      $selected_subarticulation := 0
      $btn_edit_subarticulation_selection_all := 0

      $i := 0

          if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))] = %_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])

      else
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browser_empty), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
      end if
    else
      $instrument_slot4 := 0
      $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset := 0
      $selected_category := 0
      $keyswitch15 := 0

        else

        end if
        inc($keyswitch15)
      end while
      $note15 := 0
      $keyswitch15 := 0
      while($keyswitch15 <= 31) 
        if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($instrument_slot4 * 32) + $keyswitch15)] # -1)
          if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($instrument_slot4 * 32) + $keyswitch15)] = %_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
            $note15 := $keyswitch15
          end if
        else
          $subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries := $keyswitch15
          $keyswitch15 := 32
        end if
        inc($keyswitch15)
      end while
      message("selected_idx: " & $note15 & ", subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries: " & ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))
      if($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries <= 8)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
        $note15 := 0
      else
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, int(195. / (real($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries) / 8.)))
        $note15 := $note15 - (($note15 - ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8)) .and. sh_right(($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8) - $note15, 31))
      end if
      $subarticulation_browser_active_category := $instrument_slot4
      $subarticulation_event_id9 := $note15
      $subarticulation1 := 195 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT)
      $sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar := - (- ($subarticulation1 - (($subarticulation_event_id9 * $subarticulation1) / ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))) .and. sh_right(- ($subarticulation1 - (($subarticulation_event_id9 * $subarticulation1) / ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))), 31))
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, 160 + ((abs($subarticulation1 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)) * (195 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT))) / $subarticulation1))
      $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset := (abs($subarticulation1 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)) * ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8)) / $subarticulation1
      $i := 0
      while($i <= (num_elements(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection) - 1)) 
        set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
        if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))] # -1)
          set_control_par_str(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !subarticulations_full_name[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))]]])
          if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))] = %_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
            set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
          else
            set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
          end if
          set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
        end if
        inc($i)
      end while
      message("set scroll slider: " & $note15)
      if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] = -1)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browser_empty), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
      else
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browser_empty), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
      end if
    end if
  end if
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_keyswitch_name), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !_articulation_names[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_editor_keyswitch_icon), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, %_articulation_icon[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_keyswitch_volume_curve_min), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_keyswitch_volume_curve_max), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_keyswitch_volume_curve), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] * -1)
  $i := 0
  while($i <= (num_elements(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope) - 1)) 
    set_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, int(round(real(int((real(%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]) / 127.) * 50.)) + (real(int((real(%_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]) / 127.) * 50.) - int((real(%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]) / 127.) * 50.)) * pow(real($i) / real(num_elements(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope)), (real(%_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]) / 100.) + 1.)))))
    set_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_line), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) - get_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT))
    inc($i)
  end while
  $i := 0
  while($i <= 3) 
    set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_left[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_right[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $i)] # -1)
      set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      if($i = $selected_subarticulation)
        set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_left[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
        set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_right[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      end if
      $note10 := %_loaded_subarticulations_start[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $i)]
      $rr1 := %_loaded_subarticulations_end[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $i)]
      $allow_repetitions0 := int(round((real($note10) / 127.) * real(31 + (sh_right($note10 - 32, 31) + 1))))
      $subarticulation_event0 := int((real($rr1) / 127.) * 31.)
      set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, %center_circles_frame_sums[$allow_repetitions0] + $subarticulation_event0)
      set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_left[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, $note10)
      set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_right[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, $rr1)
    end if
    inc($i)
  end while
  if($selected_subarticulation >= 0)
    ?xy_modwheel_assignment[2] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_start[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
    ?xy_modwheel_assignment[0] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_start[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] + %_loaded_subarticulations_fade_in[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
    ?xy_modwheel_assignment[4] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_end[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] - %_loaded_subarticulations_fade_out[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
    ?xy_modwheel_assignment[6] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_end[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_constant), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int((?xy_modwheel_assignment[0] - ?xy_modwheel_assignment[2]) * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH))))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_constant), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, int((?xy_modwheel_assignment[4] - ?xy_modwheel_assignment[0]) * 225.))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int(?xy_modwheel_assignment[2] * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH))))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_left_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - 10)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_fade_in), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_constant), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - 225)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_fade_in), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, int((?xy_modwheel_assignment[0] - ?xy_modwheel_assignment[2]) * 224.))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_fade_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_constant), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_constant), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_fade_out), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, int((?xy_modwheel_assignment[6] - ?xy_modwheel_assignment[4]) * 224.))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_right), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int(?xy_modwheel_assignment[6] * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)))) - 1)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_right_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_right), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 1)
  end if
  ?xy_dynamic_range[0] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_lower[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
  ?xy_dynamic_range[2] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_upper[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int(?xy_dynamic_range[0] * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH))))
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - 10)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_right), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int(?xy_dynamic_range[2] * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)))) - 1)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_right_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_right), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 1)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_right), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
  $idx37 := int((real(%modulation_positions[0]) * (1. - (real($polyphonic_modulation_percentage) / 100.))) + ((real(%modulation_positions[0]) * real($polyphonic_modulation_percentage)) / 100.))
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_cursor), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - 1) + int((real((($idx37 * (1 + (sh_right(127 - $idx37, 31) .or. sh_right($idx37 - 1, 31)))) - sh_right($idx37 - 1, 31)) - (127 * sh_right(127 - $idx37, 31))) / 127.) * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_right), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))))
end function
function main_page_open
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_main_page), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_bg_upper), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "bg_upper_noeditor")
end function
function select_instrument_slot
  $selected_instrument := $subarticulation0
  call dev_keys__update_preset_paths
  @name2 := @_ret170
  @_ret1800 := @_ret180
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_instrument_name_ensemble), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "(" & !instrument_name[%loaded_instrument_types[$subarticulation0]] & ")")
  $mnu_instrument_selector := $subarticulation0
  call update_keyswitch_selection
  if(get_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_page), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) = $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    call editor_page_open
  else
    if(get_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_main_page), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) = $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      call main_page_open
    end if
  end if
end function
function switch3
  $i250100 := 0
  if($group_count000 = 0)
    $i250100 := $ii8
  else
    if($group_count000 = 1)
      $i250100 := $i311
    else
      $i250100 := $iii2
    end if
  end if
  $is_free100 := $i250100
end function
function load_kontakt_effects
  %string_type0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  %string_type0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := - sh_right(abs(%loaded_instrument_types[0] - 3) - 1, 31) + - sh_right(abs(%loaded_instrument_types[0] - 4) - 1, 31)
  if($nki_type = 0)
    %string_type0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 2
  end if
  %con_sordino_lf_freq0[0] := 10000
  %con_sordino_lf_freq0[1] := 10000
  %con_sordino_lf_freq0[2] := 10000
  %con_sordino_lf_freq0[3] := 10000
  %con_sordino_lf_freq0[4] := 10000
  %con_sordino_lf_gain0[0] := 150000
  %con_sordino_lf_gain0[1] := 150000
  %con_sordino_lf_gain0[2] := 150000
  %con_sordino_lf_gain0[3] := 150000
  %con_sordino_lf_gain0[4] := 150000
  %con_sordino_lmf_freq0[0] := 500000
  %con_sordino_lmf_freq0[1] := 500000
  %con_sordino_lmf_freq0[2] := 500000
  %con_sordino_lmf_freq0[3] := 500000
  %con_sordino_lmf_freq0[4] := 500000
  %con_sordino_lmf_gain0[0] := 150000
  %con_sordino_lmf_gain0[1] := 150000
  %con_sordino_lmf_gain0[2] := 150000
  %con_sordino_lmf_gain0[3] := 150000
  %con_sordino_lmf_gain0[4] := 150000
  %con_sordino_hf_freq0[0] := 500000
  %con_sordino_hf_freq0[1] := 500000
  %con_sordino_hf_freq0[2] := 500000
  %con_sordino_hf_freq0[3] := 500000
  %con_sordino_hf_freq0[4] := 500000
  %con_sordino_hf_gain0[0] := 400000
  %con_sordino_hf_gain0[1] := 400000
  %con_sordino_hf_gain0[2] := 400000
  %con_sordino_hf_gain0[3] := 400000
  %con_sordino_hf_gain0[4] := 400000
  %con_sordino_gain0[0] := 440000
  %con_sordino_gain0[1] := 440000
  %con_sordino_gain0[2] := 440000
  %con_sordino_gain0[3] := 440000
  %con_sordino_gain0[4] := 440000
  %i24[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  while(%i24[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] < 5) 
    %con_sordino_idx0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
    %con_sordino_idx0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := %loaded_instrument_types[%i24[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)]
    wait_async(set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_TYPE, $EFFECT_TYPE_SOLID_GEQ, -1, 0, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %i24[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]))
    set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SEQ_LF_FREQ, %con_sordino_lf_freq0[%con_sordino_idx0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], -1, 0, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %i24[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
    set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SEQ_LF_GAIN, %con_sordino_lf_gain0[%con_sordino_idx0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], -1, 0, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %i24[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
    set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SEQ_LMF_FREQ, %con_sordino_lmf_freq0[%con_sordino_idx0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], -1, 0, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %i24[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
    set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SEQ_LMF_GAIN, %con_sordino_lmf_gain0[%con_sordino_idx0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], -1, 0, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %i24[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
    set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SEQ_HF_FREQ, %con_sordino_hf_freq0[%con_sordino_idx0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], -1, 0, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %i24[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
    set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SEQ_HF_GAIN, %con_sordino_hf_gain0[%con_sordino_idx0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], -1, 0, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %i24[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
    set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN, %con_sordino_gain0[%con_sordino_idx0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], -1, 0, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %i24[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
    wait_async(set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_TYPE, $EFFECT_TYPE_STEREO, -1, 5, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %i24[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]))
    wait_async(set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_TYPE, $EFFECT_TYPE_GAINER, -1, 6, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %i24[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]))
    set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_DRY_LEVEL, 0, -1, 6, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %i24[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
    wait_async(set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_TYPE, $EFFECT_TYPE_SEND_LEVELS, -1, 7, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %i24[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]))
    inc(%i24[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
  end while
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SENDLEVEL_0, 0, -1, 7, $NI_INSERT_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SENDLEVEL_1, 0, -1, 7, $NI_INSERT_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SENDLEVEL_2, 0, -1, 7, $NI_INSERT_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SENDLEVEL_3, 0, -1, 7, $NI_INSERT_BUS)
  wait_async(set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_TYPE, $EFFECT_TYPE_RAUM, -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS))
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_DECAY, 400000, -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_LOWSHELF, 500000, -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
  wait_async(set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_TYPE, $EFFECT_TYPE_FILTER, -1, 0, $NI_MAIN_BUS))
  wait_async(set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_SUBTYPE, $FILTER_TYPE_EQ2BAND, -1, 0, $NI_MAIN_BUS))
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_FREQ1, 365608, -1, 0, $NI_MAIN_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_BW1, 480000, -1, 0, $NI_MAIN_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_GAIN1, 530000, -1, 0, $NI_MAIN_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_FREQ2, 761517, -1, 0, $NI_MAIN_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_BW2, 122000, -1, 0, $NI_MAIN_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_GAIN2, 471000, -1, 0, $NI_MAIN_BUS)
  wait_async(set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_TYPE, $EFFECT_TYPE_FILTER, -1, 1, $NI_MAIN_BUS))
  wait_async(set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_SUBTYPE, $FILTER_TYPE_EQ3BAND, -1, 1, $NI_MAIN_BUS))
  $group_count000 := %string_type0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
  $ii8 := 473588
  $i311 := 365608
  $iii2 := 365608
  call switch3
  %i24[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := $is_free100
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_FREQ1, %i24[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], -1, 1, $NI_MAIN_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_BW1, 680000, -1, 1, $NI_MAIN_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_GAIN1, 500000, -1, 1, $NI_MAIN_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_FREQ2, 696114, -1, 1, $NI_MAIN_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_BW2, 80000, -1, 1, $NI_MAIN_BUS)

function wait_or_zero
  if(%uiid3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] > 0)
    wait(%uiid3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
  end if
end function
function keyswitches_on_note_base
  %uiid3[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := $lookahead * $use_constant_delay
  call wait_or_zero
  %check_before0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  %changed0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  if(in_range(%note19[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], $keyswitch_octave * 12, (($keyswitch_octave * 12) + 8) - 1))
    %inst0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
    %ks1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
    %inst0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
    while(%inst0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= 0) 
      %ks1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
      while(%ks1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= 7) 
        %check_before0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := %_keyswitch_states[(%inst0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 8) + %ks1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]
        %_keyswitch_states[(%inst0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 8) + %ks1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] := %KEY_DOWN[($keyswitch_octave * 12) + %ks1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]
        if(%check_before0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] # %_keyswitch_states[(%inst0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 8) + %ks1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]])
          %changed0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 1
          %_keyswitch_enabled_time[(%inst0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 8) + %ks1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] := $ENGINE_UPTIME
        end if
        $selected_keyswitch := %note19[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] - ($keyswitch_octave * 12)
        inc(%ks1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
      end while
      inc(%inst0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
    end while
    if(%changed0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] = 1)
      if(- sh_right(abs(get_control_par(get_ui_id($PresetBrowser), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) - $HIDE_PART_NOTHING) - 1, 31) = 1)
        call PresetBrowser__update_view
      end if
      call update_keyswitch_selection
    end if
  end if
end function
function keyswitches_on_note
  %note19[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := %uiid4[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
  call keyswitches_on_note_base
end function
function is_in_note_selection
  $s00 := 0
  select($ks00)
    case 0
      $s00 := 1
    case 1
      $s00 := - sh_right(abs($fade_out_range000) - 1, 31)
    case 2
      $s00 := - sh_right(abs($fade_out_range000) - 1, 31) + - sh_right(abs($fade_out_range000 - 1) - 1, 31)
    case 3
      $s00 := (- sh_right(abs($fade_out_range000) - 1, 31) + (- sh_right(abs($fade_out_range000 - ($highest00 / 2)) - 1, 31) * (1 + sh_right(3 - $highest00, 31)))) + (- sh_right(abs($fade_out_range000 - (($highest00 / 2) - 1)) - 1, 31) * - sh_right(3 - $highest00, 31))
    case 4
      $s00 := (- sh_right(abs($fade_out_range000) - 1, 31) + (- sh_right(abs($fade_out_range000 - ($highest00 / 2)) - 1, 31) * (1 + sh_right(3 - $highest00, 31)))) + (- sh_right(abs($fade_out_range000 - ((($highest00 - 1) / 2) + 1)) - 1, 31) * - sh_right(3 - $highest00, 31))
    case 5
      $s00 := - sh_right(abs($fade_out_range000 - ($highest00 / 2)) - 1, 31)
    case 6
      $s00 := (((- sh_right(abs($fade_out_range000 - ($highest00 / 2)) - 1, 31) * (1 + sh_right(3 - $highest00, 31))) + (- sh_right(abs($fade_out_range000 - (($highest00 / 2) - 1)) - 1, 31) * - sh_right(3 - $highest00, 31))) + (- sh_right(abs($fade_out_range000 - $highest00) - 1, 31) * (1 + sh_right(3 - ($highest00 + 1), 31)))) + (- sh_right(abs($fade_out_range000 - (((($highest00 + 1) - 1) / 2) + 1)) - 1, 31) * - sh_right(3 - ($highest00 + 1), 31))
    case 7
      $s00 := (- sh_right(abs($fade_out_range000 - ($highest00 / 2)) - 1, 31) * (1 + sh_right(3 - $highest00, 31))) + (- sh_right(abs($fade_out_range000 - (($highest00 / 2) - 1)) - 1, 31) * - sh_right(3 - $highest00, 31))
    case 8
      $s00 := (- sh_right(abs($fade_out_range000 - ($highest00 / 2)) - 1, 31) * (1 + sh_right(3 - $highest00, 31))) + (- sh_right(abs($fade_out_range000 - ((($highest00 - 1) / 2) + 1)) - 1, 31) * - sh_right(3 - $highest00, 31))
    case 9
      $s00 := - sh_right(abs($fade_out_range000 - ($highest00 - 1)) - 1, 31)
    case 10
      $s00 := - sh_right(abs($fade_out_range000 - ($highest00 - 1)) - 1, 31) + - sh_right(abs($fade_out_range000 - ($highest00 - 2)) - 1, 31)
    case 11
      $s00 := (- sh_right(abs($fade_out_range000 - ($highest00 - 1)) - 1, 31) + (- sh_right(abs($fade_out_range000 - ($highest00 / 2)) - 1, 31) * (1 + sh_right(3 - $highest00, 31)))) + (- sh_right(abs($fade_out_range000 - (($highest00 / 2) - 1)) - 1, 31) * - sh_right(3 - $highest00, 31))
    case 12
      $s00 := (- sh_right(abs($fade_out_range000 - ($highest00 - 1)) - 1, 31) + (- sh_right(abs($fade_out_range000 - ($highest00 / 2)) - 1, 31) * (1 + sh_right(3 - $highest00, 31)))) + (- sh_right(abs($fade_out_range000 - ((($highest00 - 1) / 2) + 1)) - 1, 31) * - sh_right(3 - $highest00, 31))
    case 13
      $s00 := - sh_right(abs($fade_out_range000) - 1, 31) + - sh_right(abs($fade_out_range000 - ($highest00 - 1)) - 1, 31)
    case -2147483648 to 134217727
      $s00 := 0
  end select
  $is_in_note_selection_boolean := 1 + sh_right(abs($s00) - 1, 31)
end function
function articulation_event_clear
  $output_type0 := 0
  if($instrument1 # -1)
    $output_type0 := 0
    while($output_type0 <= 3) 
      %_articulation_event_list[($instrument1 * 4) + $output_type0] := -1
      inc($output_type0)
    end while
    %articulation_event_instrument[$instrument1] := -1
    %articulation_event_keyswitch[$instrument1] := -1
    %articulation_event_note[$instrument1] := -1
    %articulation_event_timestamp[$instrument1] := -1
  end if
end function
function articulation_event_is_event_active
  $is_active0 := 0
  $i26 := 0
  $trigger_clear0 := -1
  if($articulation_event_id2 >= 0)
    $i26 := 0
    while($i26 <= 3) 
      if(%_articulation_event_list[($articulation_event_id2 * 4) + $i26] # -1)
        if(%_articulation_event_list[($articulation_event_id2 * 4) + $i26] = -999)
          $is_active0 := 1
          $trigger_clear0 := 0
        else
          if(abs(sh_right(abs(- sh_right(abs(%subarticulation_event_list[%_articulation_event_list[($articulation_event_id2 * 4) + $i26]] - -1) - 1, 31)) - 1, 31)) = 1)
            $is_active0 := 1
            $trigger_clear0 := 0
          else
            if(%_articulation_event_list[($articulation_event_id2 * 4) + $i26] >= 0)
              if($trigger_clear0 = -1)
                $trigger_clear0 := 1
              end if
            end if
          end if
        end if
      end if
      inc($i26)
    end while
  end if
  if($trigger_clear0 = 1)
    $instrument1 := $articulation_event_id2
    call articulation_event_clear
  end if
  $ret18 := $is_active0
end function

  $RETURN_FLAG200 := $ret2
end function

function articulations_note_off

  $lowest1 := 0
  $lowest00 := 0
  while($lowest00 <= 7) 
    $highest1 := 0
    while($highest1 <= 3) 
      if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($modulation0 * 32) + (($lowest00 * 4) + $highest1)] # -1)
        $lowest1 := 0

function update_selected_notes
  $pressed_key_idx := 0
  $i := %nki_range[1]
  while($i >= %nki_range[0]) 
    if((%pressed_keys[$i] > ($ENGINE_UPTIME - $input_acceptance_time)) or ((($NI_CALLBACK_TYPE # $NI_CB_TYPE_RELEASE) or ($last_note_input_time > ($ENGINE_UPTIME - $input_acceptance_time))) and (%pressed_keys[$i] > 0)))
      message("trig " & $i)
      $inst := 0
      while($inst <= 0) 
        $fade_out_range000 := ($num_pressed_keys - 1) - $pressed_key_idx
        $highest00 := $num_pressed_keys
        $ks00 := %note_selections[$inst]
        call is_in_note_selection
        if(($is_in_note_selection_boolean = 1) and (%_pressed_notes_per_instrument[($inst * 128) + $i] = 0))
          %_pressed_notes_per_instrument[($inst * 128) + $i] := 1
          message("b")
          $subarticulation_id0 := $inst
          $ret26 := $i
          $level0 := 1 - ((1 - %key_velocity[$i]) .and. sh_right(1 - %key_velocity[$i], 31))
          $subarticulation_event_id1 := %pressed_keys[$i] - $ENGINE_UPTIME
          call articulations_on_note
          $_ret20000 := $_iter9017002
          $_ret33000 := $_ret3300
        else
          if(($is_in_note_selection_boolean = 0) and (%_pressed_notes_per_instrument[($inst * 128) + $i] = 1))
            %_pressed_notes_per_instrument[($inst * 128) + $i] := 0
            $modulation0 := $inst
            $subarticulation_event_id2 := $i
            call articulations_note_off
            $is_active0000 := $string01
          end if
        end if
        inc($inst)
      end while
    end if
    if(%pressed_keys[$i] > 0)
      inc($pressed_key_idx)
    end if
    dec($i)
  end while
  $inst := 0
  while($inst <= 0) 
    %active_notes[$inst] := 0
    $i := %nki_range[0]
    while($i <= %nki_range[1]) 
      if(%_pressed_notes_per_instrument[($inst * 128) + $i] = 1)
        inc(%active_notes[$inst])
      end if
      inc($i)
    end while
    inc($inst)
  end while
end function
function subarticulation_reacts_to_modwheel
  $result8 := 0
  if($subarticulation_id0 >= 0)
    if(%subarticulation_type_behavior_list[%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$subarticulation_id0]]] = 1)
      $result8 := 1
    end if
  end if
  $ret26 := $result8
end function
function subarticulation_event_set_event_id
  %subarticulation_event_list[$_iter9017002] := $_iter90050002
end function
function subarticulation_event_fade_out
  if(abs(sh_right(abs(- sh_right(abs(%subarticulation_event_list[$subart_slot100] - -1) - 1, 31)) - 1, 31)) = 1)
    fade_out(%subarticulation_event_list[$subart_slot100], $idx4500 * 1000, $highest00)
    if(abs(sh_right(abs(- sh_right(abs(%subarticulation_event_octave_layer_id[$subart_slot100] - -1) - 1, 31)) - 1, 31)) = 1)
      fade_out(%subarticulation_event_octave_layer_id[$subart_slot100], $idx4500 * 1000, $highest00)
    end if
    if(%subarticulation_event_transition_event_id[$subart_slot100] # -1)
      fade_out(%subarticulation_event_transition_event_id[$subart_slot100], $idx4500 * 1000, $highest00)
    end if
    if(%subarticulation_event_transition_octave_event_id[$subart_slot100] # -1)
      fade_out(%subarticulation_event_transition_octave_event_id[$subart_slot100], $idx4500 * 1000, $highest00)
    end if
    if($highest00 = 1)
      $_iter9017002 := $subart_slot100
      $_iter90050002 := -1
      call subarticulation_event_set_event_id
    end if
  end if
end function
function trigger_ks_fade
  $ks_fade_time := %note19[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
  %event2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  $is_active000 := 0
  $i38 := 0
  while($i38 < num_elements(%found_shared_legatos)) 
    %found_shared_legatos[$i38] := $is_active000
    inc($i38)
  end while
  $is_active000 := 0
  $i38 := 0
  while($i38 < num_elements(%_any_longs)) 
    %_any_longs[$i38] := $is_active000
    inc($i38)
  end while
  $i := %nki_range[0]
  while($i <= %nki_range[1]) 
    %inst1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
    while(%inst1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] < 1) 
      %longs_in_new_keyswitches0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
      %longs_in_new_keyswitches0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
      %ks5[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
      while(%ks5[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] < 8) 
        if(%_keyswitch_states[(%inst1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 8) + %ks5[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] = 1)
          %subart0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
          while(%subart0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] < 4) 
            $subarticulation_id0 := %_loaded_subarticulations[(%inst1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 32) + ((%ks5[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 4) + %subart0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])]
            call subarticulation_reacts_to_modwheel
            %_ret490[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := $ret26
            if(%_ret490[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] = 1)
              %longs_in_new_keyswitches0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 1
            end if

end function
function articulations_compute_fade_level
  ~subarticulation_modulation_strength0 := 0.
  $fade_in_start0 := %_loaded_subarticulations_start[($trigger_clear000 * 32) + (($i2600 * 4) + $is_active000)]
  $fade_in_range0 := %_loaded_subarticulations_fade_in[($trigger_clear000 * 32) + (($i2600 * 4) + $is_active000)]
  $fade_out_end0 := %_loaded_subarticulations_end[($trigger_clear000 * 32) + (($i2600 * 4) + $is_active000)]
  $fade_out_range0 := %_loaded_subarticulations_fade_out[($trigger_clear000 * 32) + (($i2600 * 4) + $is_active000)]
  if(in_range($modulation_position0, $fade_in_start0, $fade_out_end0))
    ~subarticulation_modulation_strength0 := 1.
    if(in_range($modulation_position0, $fade_in_start0, $fade_in_start0 + $fade_in_range0) and ($fade_in_range0 > 0))
      ~subarticulation_modulation_strength0 := real($modulation_position0 - $fade_in_start0) / real($fade_in_range0)
    else
      if(in_range($modulation_position0, $fade_out_end0 - $fade_out_range0, $fade_out_end0) and ($fade_out_range0 > 0))
        ~subarticulation_modulation_strength0 := real($fade_out_end0 - $modulation_position0) / real($fade_out_range0)
      end if
    end if
  end if
  ~ret30 := ~subarticulation_modulation_strength0
end function

function get_next_rr
  $rr1 := 0
  $allow_repetitions0 := 0
  if(%subarticulations_rrr[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($instrument10 * 32) + (($keyswitch10 * 4) + $subarticulation_idx7)]]] = 0)
    if(%_loaded_subarticulations_rr_mode[($instrument10 * 32) + (($keyswitch10 * 4) + $subarticulation_idx7)] = 0)
      $rr1 := (%_rr_data_idx[($instrument10 * 4096) + (($keyswitch10 * 512) + (($subarticulation_idx7 * 128) + $note10))] + 1) mod %subarticulations_rr_num[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($instrument10 * 32) + (($keyswitch10 * 4) + $subarticulation_idx7)]]]
    else
      $rr1 := random(0, %subarticulations_rr_num[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($instrument10 * 32) + (($keyswitch10 * 4) + $subarticulation_idx7)]]] - 1)
    end if
  else
    if(($ENGINE_UPTIME - %_rr_data_time[($instrument10 * 4096) + (($keyswitch10 * 512) + (($subarticulation_idx7 * 128) + $note10))]) > %subarticulations_rrr_reset_time[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($instrument10 * 32) + (($keyswitch10 * 4) + $subarticulation_idx7)]]])
      if(%_loaded_subarticulations_rr_mode[($instrument10 * 32) + (($keyswitch10 * 4) + $subarticulation_idx7)] = 0)
        $rr1 := (%_rr_data_idx[($instrument10 * 4096) + (($keyswitch10 * 512) + (($subarticulation_idx7 * 128) + $note10))] + 1) mod %subarticulations_rrr[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($instrument10 * 32) + (($keyswitch10 * 4) + $subarticulation_idx7)]]]
      else
        $rr1 := random(0, %subarticulations_rrr[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($instrument10 * 32) + (($keyswitch10 * 4) + $subarticulation_idx7)]]] - 1)
        $allow_repetitions0 := 1
      end if
    else
      if(%_loaded_subarticulations_rr_mode[($instrument10 * 32) + (($keyswitch10 * 4) + $subarticulation_idx7)] = 0)
        $rr1 := %subarticulations_rrr[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($instrument10 * 32) + (($keyswitch10 * 4) + $subarticulation_idx7)]]] - ((%subarticulations_rrr[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($instrument10 * 32) + (($keyswitch10 * 4) + $subarticulation_idx7)]]] - ((%_rr_data_idx[($instrument10 * 4096) + (($keyswitch10 * 512) + (($subarticulation_idx7 * 128) + $note10))] + 1) mod %subarticulations_rr_num[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($instrument10 * 32) + (($keyswitch10 * 4) + $subarticulation_idx7)]]])) .and. sh_right(%subarticulations_rrr[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($instrument10 * 32) + (($keyswitch10 * 4) + $subarticulation_idx7)]]] - ((%_rr_data_idx[($instrument10 * 4096) + (($keyswitch10 * 512) + (($subarticulation_idx7 * 128) + $note10))] + 1) mod %subarticulations_rr_num[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($instrument10 * 32) + (($keyswitch10 * 4) + $subarticulation_idx7)]]]), 31))
      else
        $rr1 := random(%subarticulations_rrr[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($instrument10 * 32) + (($keyswitch10 * 4) + $subarticulation_idx7)]]], %subarticulations_rr_num[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($instrument10 * 32) + (($keyswitch10 * 4) + $subarticulation_idx7)]]] - 1)
      end if
    end if
    %_rr_data_time[($instrument10 * 4096) + (($keyswitch10 * 512) + (($subarticulation_idx7 * 128) + $note10))] := $ENGINE_UPTIME
  end if
  if(($rr1 = %_rr_data_idx[($instrument10 * 4096) + (($keyswitch10 * 512) + (($subarticulation_idx7 * 128) + $note10))]) and ($allow_repetitions0 = 0))
    $rr1 := ($rr1 + 1) mod %subarticulations_rr_num[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($instrument10 * 32) + (($keyswitch10 * 4) + $subarticulation_idx7)]]]
  end if
  %_rr_data_idx[($instrument10 * 4096) + (($keyswitch10 * 512) + (($subarticulation_idx7 * 128) + $note10))] := $rr1
  $fade_out_range000 := $rr1
end function
function subarticulation_event_get_free_index
  $_iter901602 := -1
  $current0022002 := 0
  while(($current0022002 < 256) and ($current0022002 >= 0)) 
    $current0022002 := search(%subarticulation_event_list, -1, $current0022002, 256)
    if($current0022002 >= 0)
      if(%subarticulation_event_last_used[$current0022002] < ($ENGINE_UPTIME - $lookahead))
        $_iter901602 := $current0022002
        $current0022002 := 256
      end if
      inc($current0022002)
    end if
  end while
  $_iter10022002 := $_iter901602
end function
