  if(abs(sh_right(abs(- sh_right(abs(%subarticulation_event_list[$_iter901060] - -1) - 1, 31)) - 1, 31)) = 1)
    set_event_mark(%subarticulation_event_list[$_iter901060], $_iter101060)
    if(abs(sh_right(abs(- sh_right(abs(%subarticulation_event_octave_layer_id[$_iter901060] - -1) - 1, 31)) - 1, 31)) = 1)
      set_event_mark(%subarticulation_event_octave_layer_id[$_iter901060], $_iter101060)
    end if
  end if
end function
function subarticulation_event_fade_in
  if(abs(sh_right(abs(- sh_right(abs(%subarticulation_event_list[$ks00] - -1) - 1, 31)) - 1, 31)) = 1)
    fade_in(%subarticulation_event_list[$ks00], $s00 * 1000)
    if(abs(sh_right(abs(- sh_right(abs(%subarticulation_event_octave_layer_id[$ks00] - -1) - 1, 31)) - 1, 31)) = 1)
      fade_in(%subarticulation_event_octave_layer_id[$ks00], $s00 * 1000)
    end if
    if(%subarticulation_event_transition_event_id[$ks00] # -1)
      fade_in(%subarticulation_event_transition_event_id[$ks00], $s00 * 1000)
    end if
    if(%subarticulation_event_transition_octave_event_id[$ks00] # -1)
      fade_in(%subarticulation_event_transition_octave_event_id[$ks00], $s00 * 1000)
    end if
  end if
end function
function subarticulation_event_disallow_groups
  $_iter901502 := $ret46102
  $_iter9002102 := $EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP
  $_iter1002102 := 0
  $current002102 := $ALL_GROUPS
  call subarticulation_event_set_event_par_arr
end function
function subarticulation_event_allow_groups
  $_iter901502 := $_iter9010402
  $_iter9002102 := $EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP
  $_iter1002102 := 1
  $current002102 := $_iter1010402
  call subarticulation_event_set_event_par_arr
end function
function subarticulation_event_change_vol
  if(abs(sh_right(abs(- sh_right(abs(%subarticulation_event_list[$current01060] - -1) - 1, 31)) - 1, 31)) = 1)
    change_vol(%subarticulation_event_list[$current01060], $cc_value110, $transition_idx000)
    if(abs(sh_right(abs(- sh_right(abs(%subarticulation_event_octave_layer_id[$current01060] - -1) - 1, 31)) - 1, 31)) = 1)
      change_vol(%subarticulation_event_octave_layer_id[$current01060], $cc_value110, $transition_idx000)
    end if
  end if
end function
function repetition_engine_add
  $idx37 := search(%repetition_engine_subarticulation_events, -1)
  if($idx37 # -1)
    %repetition_engine_subarticulation_events[$idx37] := $subarticulation_event0
    $repetition_engine_active := 1
    if($repetition_engine_start_time = -1)
      $repetition_engine_start_time := $ENGINE_UPTIME
    end if
    $repetition_engine_highest_idx := $repetition_engine_highest_idx - (($repetition_engine_highest_idx - $idx37) .and. sh_right($repetition_engine_highest_idx - $idx37, 31))
  else
    message("REACHED MAX_SUBARTICULATIONS_IN_REPETITION_ENGINE")
  end if
end function
function update_authoring_labels
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_sustain_release), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, $sli_sustain_release & " + " & $sli_sustain_release_offset & " ms")
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_trans_start), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, $sli_trans_start & " + " & $sli_trans_start_offset & " ms")
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_trans_fadeIn), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, int((real($sli_trans_fadeIn) / 1000000.) * 750.) & " + " & int((real($sli_trans_fadeIn_offset) / 1000000.) * 750.) & " ms")
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_trans_volume), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, (round((real($sli_trans_volume) / 1000.) * pow(10., 2.)) / pow(10., 2.)) & " + " & (round((real($sli_trans_volume_offset) / 1000.) * pow(10., 2.)) / pow(10., 2.)) & " dB")
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_trans_fadeOut), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, int((real($sli_trans_fadeOut) / 1000000.) * 1000.) & " + " & int((real($sli_trans_fadeOut_offset) / 1000000.) * 1000.) & " ms")
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_sustain_wait), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, int((real($sli_sustain_wait) / 1000000.) * 500.) & " + " & int((real($sli_sustain_wait_offset) / 1000000.) * 500.) & " ms")
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_sustain_fadeIn), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, int((real($sli_sustain_fadeIn) / 1000000.) * 500.) & " + " & int((real($sli_sustain_fadeIn_offset) / 1000000.) * 500.) & " ms")
end function
function update_authoring_transition
  if(get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_authoring_follow), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) = 1)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($vlue_authoring_start_note), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, $i26100)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($vlue_authoring_end_note), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, $is_active0100)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, $_ret33000)
    if(abs($i26100 - $is_active0100) <= 12)
      $authoring_interval_valid := 1
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_sustain_release), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_legato_data_sus_release_time[($mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer * 3200) + (($i26100 * 25) + (abs($is_active0100 - $i26100) + (- sh_right(- ($is_active0100 - $i26100), 31) * 12)))])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_trans_start), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_legato_data_trans_zone_start[($mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer * 3200) + (($i26100 * 25) + (abs($is_active0100 - $i26100) + (- sh_right(- ($is_active0100 - $i26100), 31) * 12)))])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_trans_fadeIn), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_legato_data_trans_fade_in_time[($mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer * 3200) + (($i26100 * 25) + (abs($is_active0100 - $i26100) + (- sh_right(- ($is_active0100 - $i26100), 31) * 12)))])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_trans_volume), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_legato_data_trans_zone_volume[($mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer * 3200) + (($i26100 * 25) + (abs($is_active0100 - $i26100) + (- sh_right(- ($is_active0100 - $i26100), 31) * 12)))])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_trans_fadeOut), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_legato_data_trans_fade_out_time[($mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer * 3200) + (($i26100 * 25) + (abs($is_active0100 - $i26100) + (- sh_right(- ($is_active0100 - $i26100), 31) * 12)))])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_sustain_wait), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_legato_data_sus_wait_time[($mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer * 3200) + (($i26100 * 25) + (abs($is_active0100 - $i26100) + (- sh_right(- ($is_active0100 - $i26100), 31) * 12)))])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_sustain_fadeIn), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_legato_data_sus_fade_in_time[($mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer * 3200) + (($i26100 * 25) + (abs($is_active0100 - $i26100) + (- sh_right(- ($is_active0100 - $i26100), 31) * 12)))])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_sustain_release_offset), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_legato_data_sus_release_time_offset[($mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer * 3200) + (($i26100 * 25) + (abs($is_active0100 - $i26100) + (- sh_right(- ($is_active0100 - $i26100), 31) * 12)))])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_trans_start_offset), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_legato_data_trans_zone_start_offset[($mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer * 3200) + (($i26100 * 25) + (abs($is_active0100 - $i26100) + (- sh_right(- ($is_active0100 - $i26100), 31) * 12)))])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_trans_fadeIn_offset), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_legato_data_trans_fade_in_time_offset[($mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer * 3200) + (($i26100 * 25) + (abs($is_active0100 - $i26100) + (- sh_right(- ($is_active0100 - $i26100), 31) * 12)))])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_trans_volume_offset), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_legato_data_trans_zone_volume_offset[($mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer * 3200) + (($i26100 * 25) + (abs($is_active0100 - $i26100) + (- sh_right(- ($is_active0100 - $i26100), 31) * 12)))])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_trans_fadeOut_offset), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_legato_data_trans_fade_out_time_offset[($mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer * 3200) + (($i26100 * 25) + (abs($is_active0100 - $i26100) + (- sh_right(- ($is_active0100 - $i26100), 31) * 12)))])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_sustain_wait_offset), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_legato_data_sus_wait_time_offset[($mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer * 3200) + (($i26100 * 25) + (abs($is_active0100 - $i26100) + (- sh_right(- ($is_active0100 - $i26100), 31) * 12)))])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_sustain_fadeIn_offset), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_legato_data_sus_fade_in_time_offset[($mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer * 3200) + (($i26100 * 25) + (abs($is_active0100 - $i26100) + (- sh_right(- ($is_active0100 - $i26100), 31) * 12)))])
      call update_authoring_labels
    else
      $authoring_interval_valid := 0
    end if
    if($authoring_interval_valid = 1)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_authoring_blocker), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    else
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_authoring_blocker), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    end if
  end if
end function
function last_transitions_update
  $i34 := 0
  while($i34 <= (num_elements(%_last_transitions) - 1)) 
    if(%_last_transitions[$i34] # -1)
      if(%_last_transitions_timecode[$i34] < ($ENGINE_UPTIME - 2000))
        %_last_transitions[$i34] := -1
      end if
    end if
    inc($i34)
  end while
end function
function last_transitions_contains
  $result12 := 0
  call last_transitions_update
  $i35 := 0
  while($i35 <= 7) 
    if(%_last_transitions[($instrument2 * 256) + (($keyswitch1 * 32) + (($subarticulation_idx0 * 8) + $i35))] = ((128 * $transition_type0) + $note1))
      $result12 := 1
      %_last_transitions[($instrument2 * 256) + (($keyswitch1 * 32) + (($subarticulation_idx0 * 8) + $i35))] := -1
    end if
    inc($i35)
  end while
  $ret34 := $result12
end function
function last_transitions_add_event
  $idx38 := -1
  $min5 := %_last_transitions_timecode[($instrument4 * 256) + (($keyswitch2 * 32) + ($subarticulation_idx2 * 8))]
  $min_idx0 := 0
  $i36 := 0
  if($transition_type1 >= 0)
    $i36 := 0
    while($i36 <= 7) 
      if(%_last_transitions[($instrument4 * 256) + (($keyswitch2 * 32) + (($subarticulation_idx2 * 8) + $i36))] = -1)
        $idx38 := $i36
        if($min5 > %_last_transitions_timecode[($instrument4 * 256) + (($keyswitch2 * 32) + (($subarticulation_idx2 * 8) + $i36))])
          $min5 := %_last_transitions_timecode[($instrument4 * 256) + (($keyswitch2 * 32) + (($subarticulation_idx2 * 8) + $i36))]
          $min_idx0 := $i36
        end if
      end if
      inc($i36)
    end while
    if($idx38 # -1)
      %_last_transitions[($instrument4 * 256) + (($keyswitch2 * 32) + (($subarticulation_idx2 * 8) + $idx38))] := (128 * $transition_type1) + $note4
      %_last_transitions_timecode[($instrument4 * 256) + (($keyswitch2 * 32) + (($subarticulation_idx2 * 8) + $idx38))] := $ENGINE_UPTIME
    else
      %_last_transitions[($instrument4 * 256) + (($keyswitch2 * 32) + (($subarticulation_idx2 * 8) + $min_idx0))] := (128 * $transition_type1) + $note4
      %_last_transitions_timecode[($instrument4 * 256) + (($keyswitch2 * 32) + (($subarticulation_idx2 * 8) + $min_idx0))] := $ENGINE_UPTIME
    end if
  end if
end function
function repetition_engine_remove
  $trigger_clear0100 := search(%repetition_engine_subarticulation_events, $i250100)
  if($trigger_clear0100 # -1)
    %repetition_engine_subarticulation_events[$trigger_clear0100] := -1
  end if
end function
function subarticulation_note_off
  if(abs(sh_right(abs(- sh_right(abs(%subarticulation_event_list[$i6] - -1) - 1, 31)) - 1, 31)) = 1)
    message("release subart " & $i6)
    $lowest1 := %subarticulation_event_subarticulation[$i6]
    $i250100 := $i6
    call repetition_engine_remove
    if(((%subarticulations_release_time[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$lowest1]] = 0) or (($ENGINE_UPTIME - %last_pressed[%subarticulation_event_note[$i6]]) < %subarticulations_release_time[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$lowest1]])) or (%_loaded_subarticulations_repetition_speed[(%articulation_event_instrument[%subarticulation_event_articulation_event[$i6]] * 32) + ((%articulation_event_keyswitch[%subarticulation_event_articulation_event[$i6]] * 4) + %subarticulation_event_subarticulation_idx[$i6])] > 0))
      $highest1 := %_articulation_release[(%articulation_event_instrument[%subarticulation_event_articulation_event[$i6]] * 8) + %articulation_event_keyswitch[%subarticulation_event_articulation_event[$i6]]]
      if($highest1 >= 0)
        $subart_slot100 := $i6
        $idx4500 := $highest1
        $highest00 := 1
        call subarticulation_event_fade_out
      else
        if((%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$lowest1]] = 2) or (%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$lowest1]] = 9))
          $highest1 := 300
          $subart_slot100 := $i6
          $idx4500 := 300
          $highest00 := 1
          call subarticulation_event_fade_out
        else
          note_off(%subarticulation_event_list[$i6])
          if(%subarticulation_event_octave_layer_id[$i6] # -1)
            note_off(%subarticulation_event_octave_layer_id[$i6])
          end if
        end if
      end if
      if((%subarticulations_release_group[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$lowest1]] = 1) and (($authoring_page_active = 0) or ($btn_play_sustain = 1)))
        $lowest00 := play_note(%subarticulation_event_actual_note[$i6], %key_velocity[%subarticulation_event_note[$i6]], 0, 0)
        $event0 := $lowest00
        $output_type0 := $OUTPUT_TYPE_BUS_OUT
        $instrument1 := %articulation_event_instrument[%subarticulation_event_articulation_event[$i6]]
        call redirect_output_ensemble
        $octave_event0 := -1
        if(%subarticulation_event_octave_layer[$i6] # 0)
          $octave_event0 := play_note(%subarticulation_event_actual_note[$i6] + 12, %key_velocity[%subarticulation_event_note[$i6]], 0, 0)
          $event0 := $octave_event0
          $output_type0 := $OUTPUT_TYPE_BUS_OUT
          $instrument1 := %articulation_event_instrument[%subarticulation_event_articulation_event[$i6]]
          call redirect_output_ensemble
        end if
        $_iter9017002 := $i6
        $_iter90050002 := $lowest00
        call subarticulation_event_set_event_id
        $_iter90023002 := $i6
        $_iter90022002 := $octave_event0
        call subarticulation_octave_layer_set_event_id
        $ret46102 := $i6
        call subarticulation_event_disallow_groups
        $ii4 := 0
        $i37 := 0
        while($i37 <= (%subarticulations_dynamic_layers[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$lowest1]] - 1)) 
          $ii4 := 0
          while($ii4 <= 5) 
            if((%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$lowest1]] # 2) and (%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$lowest1]] # 9))
              $_iter9010402 := $i6
              $_iter1010402 := (((%subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$lowest1]] + 1) + (((6 * %subarticulations_rr_num[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$lowest1]]) * %subarticulations_dynamic_layers[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$lowest1]]) * (%subarticulation_event_interval[$i6] * 2))) + ((($i37 * (%subarticulations_release_group[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$lowest1]] + 1)) + 1) * 6)) + $ii4
              call subarticulation_event_allow_groups
            else
              $_iter9010402 := $i6
              $_iter1010402 := (((%subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$lowest1]] + 1) + (6 * ((%subarticulations_dynamic_layers[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$lowest1]] * 2) + %subarticulations_trans_num[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$lowest1]]))) + ($i37 * 6)) + $ii4
              call subarticulation_event_allow_groups
            end if
            inc($ii4)
          end while
          inc($i37)
        end while
        $subarticulation_event_id2 := $i6
        $modulation0 := %subarticulation_event_modulation[$i6]
        call subarticulation_set_modulation
        $subarticulation_event_id1 := $i6
        $level0 := %subarticulation_event_level[$i6]
        call subarticulation_set_level
        $current01060 := $i6
        $cc_value110 := %_loaded_subarticulations_volume[(%articulation_event_instrument[%subarticulation_event_articulation_event[$i6]] * 32) + ((%articulation_event_keyswitch[%subarticulation_event_articulation_event[$i6]] * 4) + %subarticulation_event_subarticulation_idx[$i6])] * 1000
        $transition_idx000 := 1
        call subarticulation_event_change_vol
        if((%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$lowest1]] = 2) or (%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$lowest1]] = 9))
          $idx30 := %articulation_event_instrument[%subarticulation_event_articulation_event[$i6]]
          $RETURN_FLAG100 := %subarticulation_event_note[$i6]
          call note_to_string
          $_ret880 := $RETURN_FLAG200
          %_release_per_string[(%articulation_event_instrument[%subarticulation_event_articulation_event[$i6]] * 10) + ($_ret880 * 2)] := $lowest00
          $idx30 := %articulation_event_instrument[%subarticulation_event_articulation_event[$i6]]
          $RETURN_FLAG100 := %subarticulation_event_note[$i6]
          call note_to_string
          $reduced_note00 := $RETURN_FLAG200
          %_release_per_string[(%articulation_event_instrument[%subarticulation_event_articulation_event[$i6]] * 10) + (($reduced_note00 * 2) + 1)] := $octave_event0
        end if
      end if
    end if
    $_iter9017002 := $i6
    $_iter90050002 := -1
    call subarticulation_event_set_event_id
    $_iter90023002 := $i6
    $_iter90022002 := -1
    call subarticulation_octave_layer_set_event_id
  end if
  %subarticulation_event_note[$i6] := -1
  %subarticulation_event_actual_note[$i6] := -1
  %subarticulation_event_subarticulation[$i6] := -1
  %subarticulation_event_modulation[$i6] := -1
  %subarticulation_event_level[$i6] := -1
  %subarticulation_event_interval[$i6] := 0
  %subarticulation_event_last_used[$i6] := $ENGINE_UPTIME
  %subarticulation_event_articulation_event[$i6] := -1
  %subarticulation_event_subarticulation_idx[$i6] := -1
end function
function subarticulation_play_note
  $subarticulation_event_id18 := 0
  call subarticulation_event_get_free_index
  $subarticulation_event_id18 := $_iter10022002
  $idx360 := 0
  $result110 := -1
  if(%_articulation_mw_to_velocity[($i311 * 8) + $iii2] = 1)
    $modulation1 := int((1000000. * (real(%_loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_lower[($i311 * 32) + (($iii2 * 4) + $ii8)]) + ((real($velocity0) / 127.) * real(%_loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_upper[($i311 * 32) + (($iii2 * 4) + $ii8)] - %_loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_lower[($i311 * 32) + (($iii2 * 4) + $ii8)])))) / 127.)
    $trigger_clear000 := $i311
    $i2600 := $iii2
    $is_active000 := $ii8
    $modulation_position0 := $velocity0
    call articulations_compute_fade_level
    ~_ret690 := ~ret30
    $level1 := int(((real($velocity0) / 127.) * 1000000.) * ~_ret690)
  end if
  $fade_out_range01 := -1
  $fade_in_start01 := -1
  $fade_in_range01 := int((real($modulation1) / 1000000.) * 127.)
  $fade_out_end01 := 0
  $ii5 := 0
  if(($subarticulation_event_id18 # -1) and ($ii8 # -1))
    $_short_circuit30 := 0
    $_sc_temp00 := 0
    if((($subarticulations_solo_states_any_active = 0) or (%_subarticulations_solo_states[($i311 * 32) + (($iii2 * 4) + $ii8)] = 1)) and (%_subarticulations_mute_states[($i311 * 32) + (($iii2 * 4) + $ii8)] = 0))
      $_sc_temp00 := 1
    end if
    if($_sc_temp00 = 1)
      if(%global_fade_in[$note6] = 0)
        $_short_circuit30 := 1
      else
        $subarticulation_id0 := $i40
        call subarticulation_reacts_to_modwheel
        $_ret700 := $ret26
        if($_ret700 = 1)
          $_short_circuit30 := 1
        end if
      end if
    end if
    if($_short_circuit30 = 1)
      if((%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$i40]] # 2) and (%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$i40]] # 9))
        $idx360 := play_note($note6 - (%subarticulations_octave_offset[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$i40]] * 12), $velocity0, 0, 0)
        $event0 := $idx360
        $output_type0 := $OUTPUT_TYPE_BUS_OUT
        $instrument1 := $i311
        call redirect_output_ensemble
        if(($octave_layer0 # 0) and in_range((($note6 - (%subarticulations_octave_offset[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$i40]] * 12)) + $transpose0) + (12 * $octave_layer0), %subarticulations_range_lower[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$i40]], %subarticulations_range_upper[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$i40]]))
          $result110 := play_note((($note6 - (%subarticulations_octave_offset[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$i40]] * 12)) + $transpose0) + (12 * $octave_layer0), $velocity0, 0, 0)
          $event0 := $result110
          $output_type0 := $OUTPUT_TYPE_BUS_OUT
          $instrument1 := $i311
          call redirect_output_ensemble
        end if
        if(((%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$i40]] = 0) or (%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$i40]] = 3)) or (%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$i40]] = 5))
          if($previous_note0 >= 0)
            if((%articulation_event_instrument[%subarticulation_event_articulation_event[$previous_note0]] = $i311) and (%articulation_event_keyswitch[%subarticulation_event_articulation_event[$previous_note0]] = $iii2))
              $subart_slot100 := $previous_note0
              $idx4500 := 1000 - int((700. * real(%_loaded_subarticulations_tightness[($i311 * 32) + (($iii2 * 4) + $ii8)])) / 100.)
              $highest00 := 1
              call subarticulation_event_fade_out
            end if
          end if
        end if
        $_iter9017002 := $subarticulation_event_id18
        $_iter90050002 := $idx360
        call subarticulation_event_set_event_id
        $_iter90023002 := $subarticulation_event_id18
        $_iter90022002 := $result110
        call subarticulation_octave_layer_set_event_id
        $_iter901060 := $subarticulation_event_id18
        $_iter101060 := $MARK_1

function delay_buffer_execute

  $ii6 := 0
  $articulation_event_is_empty0 := 0
  $all_inactive0 := 1

    $i38 := 0

      if(%delay_buffer[$i38] # -1)

          if(%delay_buffer_velo[$i38] >= 0)
            $_short_circuit50 := 0

              $_short_circuit50 := 1
            else

                $_short_circuit50 := 1
              end if
            end if
            if($_short_circuit50 = 1)
              $result63 := 0
              $instrument10 := %delay_buffer_instrument[$i38]
              $keyswitch10 := %delay_buffer_keyswitch[$i38]
              $subarticulation_idx7 := %delay_buffer_subarticulation[$i38]
              $note10 := %delay_buffer_note[$i38]
              call get_next_rr
              $_ret650 := $fade_out_range000
              $instrument_slot4 := %delay_buffer_instrument[$i38]
              $keyswitch15 := %delay_buffer_keyswitch[$i38]
              $note15 := %delay_buffer_note[$i38]
              $subarticulation3 := %delay_buffer_subarticulation[$i38]
              ~base1 := 1000000.
              call articulations_compute_modulation
              $rr10 := $ret28

              $i2610 := %delay_buffer_keyswitch[$i38]
              $is_active010 := %delay_buffer_note[$i38]
              $_ret3300 := %delay_buffer_subarticulation[$i38]
              call articulations_compute_level
              $allow_repetitions00 := $i25010

    end if
  end if
end function
function repetition_engine_update_tempo
  ~subarticulation_modulation_strength000 := real(ms_to_ticks(60000000)) / 960.
  if((~subarticulation_modulation_strength000 # ~tempo) or ($NI_CALLBACK_TYPE # $NI_CB_TYPE_LISTENER))
    $transition0 := 0
    $layer0 := 0
    $result7 := 0
    while($result7 <= 0) 
      $transition0 := 0
      while($transition0 <= 7) 
        $layer0 := 0
        while($layer0 <= 3) 
          if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($result7 * 32) + (($transition0 * 4) + $layer0)] >= 0)
            if((%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($result7 * 32) + (($transition0 * 4) + $layer0)]]] = 0) and (%_loaded_subarticulations_repetition_speed[($result7 * 32) + (($transition0 * 4) + $layer0)] > 0))
              %_repetition_interval_time[($result7 * 4096) + (($transition0 * 512) + $layer0)] := int((60000. / ~subarticulation_modulation_strength000) * (4. / real(%_loaded_subarticulations_repetition_speed[($result7 * 32) + (($transition0 * 4) + $layer0)])))
            end if
          end if
          inc($layer0)
        end while
        inc($transition0)
      end while
      inc($result7)
    end while
    ~tempo := ~subarticulation_modulation_strength000
  end if
end function
function repetition_engine_listener
  $result6 := 0
  $subarticulation0 := 0
  if($repetition_engine_active = 1)
    $i := 0
    while(($i < num_elements(%repetition_played_subarticulation_events)) and (%repetition_played_subarticulation_events[$i] # -1)) 
      %repetition_played_subarticulation_events[$i] := -1
      inc($i)
    end while
    $i := 0
    while($i <= $repetition_engine_highest_idx) 
      $articulation_event_id1 := %repetition_engine_subarticulation_events[$i]
      if($articulation_event_id1 # -1)
        $subarticulation0 := 1
        if(abs(sh_right(abs(- sh_right(abs(%subarticulation_event_list[$articulation_event_id1] - -1) - 1, 31)) - 1, 31)) = 1)
          $ret22 := %articulation_event_instrument[%subarticulation_event_articulation_event[$articulation_event_id1]]

end function

function subarticulation_group_count
  $highest00 := 0
  if((%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$ks00]] = 2) or (%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$ks00]] = 9))
    $highest00 := 6 * ((%subarticulations_dynamic_layers[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$ks00]] * 3) + %subarticulations_trans_num[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$ks00]])
  else
    $highest00 := (6 * %subarticulations_interval_num[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$ks00]]) * ((%subarticulations_rr_num[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$ks00]] * %subarticulations_dynamic_layers[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$ks00]]) * (1 + %subarticulations_release_group[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$ks00]]))
  end if
  $s00 := $highest00
end function

end function

    end if
    if(%Browser____current[$browser] # -1)
      $i2800 := $fallback_preset
      $i25020 := %Browser____current[$browser]
      %Preset____id[$i2800] := %Preset____id[$i25020]
      !Preset____name[$i2800] := !Preset____name[$i25020]
      $is_active0 := %Preset____tags[$i2800]
      $articulation_event_id2 := 1
      $ret18 := $is_active0
      while($ret18 # -1) 
        $string010 := 0
        %Floatmask____allocation[$ret18] := %Floatmask____allocation[$ret18] - $articulation_event_id2
        if(%Floatmask____allocation[$ret18] > 0)
          $ret18 := -1
          continue
        else
          %Floatmask____allocation[$ret18] := 0
        end if
        $is_active0 := $ret18
        $ret18 := -1
        $string010 := 0
        while($string010 <= 1) 
          $i360 := %_Floatmask____fm[($is_active0 * 2) + $string010]
          $string02 := 1
          $highest1 := $i360
          while($highest1 # -1) 
            $i2610 := 0
            %Bitlist____allocation[$highest1] := %Bitlist____allocation[$highest1] - $string02
            if(%Bitlist____allocation[$highest1] > 0)
              $highest1 := -1
              continue
            else
              %Bitlist____allocation[$highest1] := 0
            end if
            $i360 := $highest1
            $highest1 := -1
            $i350 := $i360
            $i3400 := 0
            if($i350 # -1)
              %Bitlist____val[$i350] := 0
              $Bitlist____free_idx := (($Bitlist____free_idx + $i350) - abs($Bitlist____free_idx - $i350)) / 2
            end if
          end while
          inc($string010)
        end while
        $i26 := $is_active0
        $trigger_clear0 := 0
        if($i26 # -1)
          $_iter18 := 0
          while($_iter18 <= 1) 
            %_Floatmask____fm[($i26 * 2) + $_iter18] := -1
            inc($_iter18)
          end while
          $Floatmask____free_idx := (($Floatmask____free_idx + $i26) - abs($Floatmask____free_idx - $i26)) / 2
        end if
      end while
      %Preset____tags[$i2800] := %Preset____tags[$i25020]
      $ii40 := %Preset____tags[$i2800]
      $i370 := 1
      if($ii40 # -1)
        %Floatmask____allocation[$ii40] := %Floatmask____allocation[$ii40] + $i370
      end if
      %Preset____icon[$i2800] := %Preset____icon[$i25020]
      !Preset____file[$i2800] := !Preset____file[$i25020]
      %Preset____deleted[$i2800] := %Preset____deleted[$i25020]
    end if
    !Preset____name[$fallback_preset] := !_articulation_names[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]
    %Preset____icon[$fallback_preset] := %_articulation_icon[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]
    $result9 := 6
    $subarticulation3 := $selected_instrument
    $note15 := $selected_keyswitch
    $keyswitch15 := 6
    %preset__array_buffer[$keyswitch15] := %_articulation_volume_min[($subarticulation3 * 8) + $note15]
    inc($keyswitch15)
    %preset__array_buffer[$keyswitch15] := %_articulation_volume_max[($subarticulation3 * 8) + $note15]
    inc($keyswitch15)
    %preset__array_buffer[$keyswitch15] := %_articulation_volume_curve[($subarticulation3 * 8) + $note15]
    inc($keyswitch15)
    %preset__array_buffer[$keyswitch15] := %_articulation_humanization[($subarticulation3 * 8) + $note15]
    inc($keyswitch15)
    %preset__array_buffer[$keyswitch15] := %_articulation_release[($subarticulation3 * 8) + $note15]
    inc($keyswitch15)
    %preset__array_buffer[$keyswitch15] := %_articulation_icon[($subarticulation3 * 8) + $note15]
    inc($keyswitch15)
    %preset__array_buffer[$keyswitch15] := %_articulation_mw_to_velocity[($subarticulation3 * 8) + $note15]
    inc($keyswitch15)
    $instrument_slot4 := 0
    while($instrument_slot4 <= 3) 
      %preset__array_buffer[$keyswitch15] := %_loaded_subarticulations[($subarticulation3 * 32) + (($note15 * 4) + $instrument_slot4)]
      inc($keyswitch15)
      %preset__array_buffer[$keyswitch15] := %_loaded_subarticulations_start[($subarticulation3 * 32) + (($note15 * 4) + $instrument_slot4)]
      inc($keyswitch15)
      %preset__array_buffer[$keyswitch15] := %_loaded_subarticulations_end[($subarticulation3 * 32) + (($note15 * 4) + $instrument_slot4)]
      inc($keyswitch15)
      %preset__array_buffer[$keyswitch15] := %_loaded_subarticulations_fade_in[($subarticulation3 * 32) + (($note15 * 4) + $instrument_slot4)]
      inc($keyswitch15)
      %preset__array_buffer[$keyswitch15] := %_loaded_subarticulations_fade_out[($subarticulation3 * 32) + (($note15 * 4) + $instrument_slot4)]
      inc($keyswitch15)
      %preset__array_buffer[$keyswitch15] := %_loaded_subarticulations_volume[($subarticulation3 * 32) + (($note15 * 4) + $instrument_slot4)]
      inc($keyswitch15)
      %preset__array_buffer[$keyswitch15] := %_loaded_subarticulations_tightness[($subarticulation3 * 32) + (($note15 * 4) + $instrument_slot4)]
      inc($keyswitch15)
      %preset__array_buffer[$keyswitch15] := %_loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_lower[($subarticulation3 * 32) + (($note15 * 4) + $instrument_slot4)]
      inc($keyswitch15)
      %preset__array_buffer[$keyswitch15] := %_loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_upper[($subarticulation3 * 32) + (($note15 * 4) + $instrument_slot4)]
      inc($keyswitch15)
      %preset__array_buffer[$keyswitch15] := %_loaded_subarticulations_vibrato[($subarticulation3 * 32) + (($note15 * 4) + $instrument_slot4)]
      inc($keyswitch15)
      %preset__array_buffer[$keyswitch15] := %_loaded_subarticulations_repetition_speed[($subarticulation3 * 32) + (($note15 * 4) + $instrument_slot4)]
      inc($keyswitch15)
      %preset__array_buffer[$keyswitch15] := %_loaded_subarticulations_rr_mode[($subarticulation3 * 32) + (($note15 * 4) + $instrument_slot4)]
      inc($keyswitch15)
      %preset__array_buffer[$keyswitch15] := %_loaded_subarticulations_trans_volume[($subarticulation3 * 32) + (($note15 * 4) + $instrument_slot4)]
      inc($keyswitch15)
      %preset__array_buffer[$keyswitch15] := %_loaded_subarticulations_trans_speed[($subarticulation3 * 32) + (($note15 * 4) + $instrument_slot4)]
      inc($keyswitch15)
      %preset__array_buffer[$keyswitch15] := %_loaded_subarticulations_trans_speed_auto[($subarticulation3 * 32) + (($note15 * 4) + $instrument_slot4)]
      inc($keyswitch15)
      inc($instrument_slot4)
    end while
  end if
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($PresetBrowser), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, %Utils__hide_state[$string020])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_main_buttons), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, %Utils__hide_state[abs(sh_right(abs((- sh_right(abs(get_control_par(get_ui_id($PresetBrowser), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) - $HIDE_PART_NOTHING) - 1, 31) .or. - sh_right(abs(get_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_credits), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) - $HIDE_PART_NOTHING) - 1, 31)) .or. - sh_right(abs(get_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_settings), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) - $HIDE_PART_NOTHING) - 1, 31)) - 1, 31))])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_browser_return), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, %Utils__hide_state[abs(sh_right(abs((- sh_right(abs(get_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_main_buttons), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) - $HIDE_PART_NOTHING) - 1, 31) .or. - sh_right(abs(get_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_settings), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) - $HIDE_PART_NOTHING) - 1, 31)) .or. - sh_right(abs(get_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_credits), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) - $HIDE_PART_NOTHING) - 1, 31)) - 1, 31))])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_settings_return), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, %Utils__hide_state[abs(sh_right(abs((- sh_right(abs(get_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_main_buttons), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) - $HIDE_PART_NOTHING) - 1, 31) .or. - sh_right(abs(get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_browser_return), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) - $HIDE_PART_NOTHING) - 1, 31)) .or. - sh_right(abs(get_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_credits), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) - $HIDE_PART_NOTHING) - 1, 31)) - 1, 31))])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_credits_return), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, %Utils__hide_state[abs(sh_right(abs((- sh_right(abs(get_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_main_buttons), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) - $HIDE_PART_NOTHING) - 1, 31) .or. - sh_right(abs(get_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_settings), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) - $HIDE_PART_NOTHING) - 1, 31)) .or. - sh_right(abs(get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_browser_return), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) - $HIDE_PART_NOTHING) - 1, 31)) - 1, 31))])
end function
function articulation_browser_open
  $string020 := 1
  call PresetBrowser__show
end function
function display_value_in_control_label
  !label0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
  %idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  if($active_label_displays_ignore = 0)
    !label0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := get_control_par_str(%set_id1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT)
    %idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := search(%active_label_displays, %set_id1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
    if(%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] = -1)
      %idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := search(%active_label_displays, -1)
      %active_label_displays[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] := %set_id1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
      !active_label_displays_texts[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] := !label0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
      message("set " & !label0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
    end if
    %active_label_displays_cb_ids[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] := $NI_CALLBACK_ID
    set_control_par_str(%set_id1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !legato_name1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & " " & !unit0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
    wait(1200000)
    if($NI_CALLBACK_ID = %active_label_displays_cb_ids[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]])
      set_control_par_str(%set_id1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !active_label_displays_texts[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]])
      %active_label_displays[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] := -1
    end if
  end if
end function
function update_mixer_channels
  $_ret33000 := 0
  while($_ret33000 < 5) 
    $is_active0100 := %microphone_position_states[$_ret33000]
    if($_ret33000 >= 4)
      $is_active0100 := %microphone_position_states[$_ret33000 + $btn_mixer_switch_bleed_channel]
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_mixer_channel_bleed_channel_off), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %fonts_regular_white[abs(sh_right(abs($is_active0100) - 1, 31)) * 6])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_mixer_channel_bleed_channel_on), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %fonts_regular_white[$is_active0100])
    end if
    if($nki_type = 0)
      $is_active0100 := 1
      set_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_enable[$_ret33000], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    end if
    $i2800 := abs(sh_right(abs($is_active0100) - 1, 31))
    set_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_disable_input[$_ret33000], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, %Utils__hide_state[$i2800])
    set_control_par(%lbl_mixer_channel_name[$_ret33000], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %fonts_regular_large_white[$is_active0100])
    set_control_par(%lbl_mixer_channel_out[$_ret33000], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %fonts_regular_white[$is_active0100])
    set_control_par(%lbl_mixer_channel_rev_send[$_ret33000], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %fonts_regular_white[$is_active0100])
    set_control_par_str(%sli_mixer_channel_pan[$_ret33000], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "knb_slider_pan" & !Utils__disabled_assets[1 - $is_active0100])
    set_control_par_str(%sli_mixer_channel_volume[$_ret33000], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "knb_slider_mixer" & !Utils__disabled_assets[1 - $is_active0100])
    set_control_par_str(%sli_mixer_channel_rev_send[$_ret33000], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "knb_small" & !Utils__disabled_assets[1 - $is_active0100])
    inc($_ret33000)
  end while
end function
function update_solo_selection
  $instrument10 := 0
  $i26100 := 0
  while($i26100 <= 4) 
    if(get_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_solo[$i26100], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) = 1)
      $instrument10 := 1
    end if
    inc($i26100)
  end while
  if($instrument10 = 1)
    $i26100 := 0
    while($i26100 <= 4) 
      set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN, 396851 * get_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_solo[$i26100], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE), -1, 5, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + $i26100)
      inc($i26100)
    end while
  else
    $i26100 := 0
    while($i26100 <= 4) 
      set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN, 396851 * abs(sh_right(abs(get_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_mute[$i26100], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)) - 1, 31)), -1, 5, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + $i26100)
      inc($i26100)
    end while
  end if
end function
function subarticulation_browser_load_category
  $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset := 0
  $selected_category := $instrument_slot4
  $keyswitch15 := 0
  while($keyswitch15 <= (num_elements(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category) - 1)) 
    if($keyswitch15 = $instrument_slot4)
      set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category[$keyswitch15], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
    else
      set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category[$keyswitch15], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
    end if
    inc($keyswitch15)
  end while
  $note15 := 0
  $keyswitch15 := 0
  while($keyswitch15 <= 31) 
    if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($instrument_slot4 * 32) + $keyswitch15)] # -1)
      if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($instrument_slot4 * 32) + $keyswitch15)] = %_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
        $note15 := $keyswitch15
      end if
    else
      $subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries := $keyswitch15
      $keyswitch15 := 32
    end if
    inc($keyswitch15)
  end while
  message("selected_idx: " & $note15 & ", subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries: " & ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))
  if($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries <= 8)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    $note15 := 0
  else
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, int(195. / (real($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries) / 8.)))
    $note15 := $note15 - (($note15 - ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8)) .and. sh_right(($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8) - $note15, 31))
  end if
  $subarticulation_browser_active_category := $instrument_slot4
  $subarticulation_event_id9 := $note15
  $subarticulation1 := 195 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT)
  $sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar := - (- ($subarticulation1 - (($subarticulation_event_id9 * $subarticulation1) / ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))) .and. sh_right(- ($subarticulation1 - (($subarticulation_event_id9 * $subarticulation1) / ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))), 31))
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, 160 + ((abs($subarticulation1 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)) * (195 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT))) / $subarticulation1))
  $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset := (abs($subarticulation1 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)) * ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8)) / $subarticulation1
  $i := 0
  while($i <= (num_elements(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection) - 1)) 
    set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))] # -1)
      set_control_par_str(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !subarticulations_full_name[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))]]])
      if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))] = %_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
        set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
      else
        set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
      end if
      set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    end if
    inc($i)
  end while
  message("set scroll slider: " & $note15)
  if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] = -1)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browser_empty), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
  else
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browser_empty), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
  end if
end function
function subarticulation_browser_close
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  if($selected_subarticulation >= 0)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_parameters), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
  else
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_overview), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
  end if
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_title), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browse), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browse), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "btn_ks_browse")
end function
function move_legato_buffer_to_instrument
  $subarticulation_idx3 := 0
  $keyswitch3 := 0
  $instrument3 := 0
  $note5 := 0
  while($note5 <= 1) 
    $subarticulation_idx3 := 0
    while($subarticulation_idx3 <= 127) 
      $keyswitch3 := 0
      while($keyswitch3 <= 24) 
        %_legato_data_sus_fade_in_time[($result7 * 204800) + (($transition0 * 25600) + (($layer0 * 6400) + (($note5 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx3 * 25) + $keyswitch3))))] := %_legato_data_buffer_sus_fade_in_time[($note5 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx3 * 25) + $keyswitch3)]
        %_legato_data_sus_release_time[($result7 * 204800) + (($transition0 * 25600) + (($layer0 * 6400) + (($note5 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx3 * 25) + $keyswitch3))))] := %_legato_data_buffer_sus_release_time[($note5 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx3 * 25) + $keyswitch3)]
        %_legato_data_sus_wait_time[($result7 * 204800) + (($transition0 * 25600) + (($layer0 * 6400) + (($note5 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx3 * 25) + $keyswitch3))))] := %_legato_data_buffer_sus_wait_time[($note5 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx3 * 25) + $keyswitch3)]
        %_legato_data_trans_fade_in_time[($result7 * 204800) + (($transition0 * 25600) + (($layer0 * 6400) + (($note5 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx3 * 25) + $keyswitch3))))] := %_legato_data_buffer_trans_fade_in_time[($note5 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx3 * 25) + $keyswitch3)]
        %_legato_data_trans_fade_out_time[($result7 * 204800) + (($transition0 * 25600) + (($layer0 * 6400) + (($note5 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx3 * 25) + $keyswitch3))))] := %_legato_data_buffer_trans_fade_out_time[($note5 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx3 * 25) + $keyswitch3)]
        %_legato_data_trans_zone_start[($result7 * 204800) + (($transition0 * 25600) + (($layer0 * 6400) + (($note5 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx3 * 25) + $keyswitch3))))] := %_legato_data_buffer_trans_zone_start[($note5 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx3 * 25) + $keyswitch3)]
        %_legato_data_trans_zone_volume[($result7 * 204800) + (($transition0 * 25600) + (($layer0 * 6400) + (($note5 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx3 * 25) + $keyswitch3))))] := %_legato_data_buffer_trans_zone_volume[($note5 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx3 * 25) + $keyswitch3)]
        %_legato_data_sus_fade_in_time_offset[($result7 * 204800) + (($transition0 * 25600) + (($layer0 * 6400) + (($note5 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx3 * 25) + $keyswitch3))))] := %_legato_data_buffer_sus_fade_in_time_offset[($note5 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx3 * 25) + $keyswitch3)]
        %_legato_data_sus_release_time_offset[($result7 * 204800) + (($transition0 * 25600) + (($layer0 * 6400) + (($note5 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx3 * 25) + $keyswitch3))))] := %_legato_data_buffer_sus_release_time_offset[($note5 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx3 * 25) + $keyswitch3)]
        %_legato_data_sus_wait_time_offset[($result7 * 204800) + (($transition0 * 25600) + (($layer0 * 6400) + (($note5 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx3 * 25) + $keyswitch3))))] := %_legato_data_buffer_sus_wait_time_offset[($note5 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx3 * 25) + $keyswitch3)]
        %_legato_data_trans_fade_in_time_offset[($result7 * 204800) + (($transition0 * 25600) + (($layer0 * 6400) + (($note5 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx3 * 25) + $keyswitch3))))] := %_legato_data_buffer_trans_fade_in_time_offset[($note5 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx3 * 25) + $keyswitch3)]
        %_legato_data_trans_fade_out_time_offset[($result7 * 204800) + (($transition0 * 25600) + (($layer0 * 6400) + (($note5 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx3 * 25) + $keyswitch3))))] := %_legato_data_buffer_trans_fade_out_time_offset[($note5 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx3 * 25) + $keyswitch3)]
        %_legato_data_trans_zone_start_offset[($result7 * 204800) + (($transition0 * 25600) + (($layer0 * 6400) + (($note5 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx3 * 25) + $keyswitch3))))] := %_legato_data_buffer_trans_zone_start_offset[($note5 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx3 * 25) + $keyswitch3)]
        %_legato_data_trans_zone_volume_offset[($result7 * 204800) + (($transition0 * 25600) + (($layer0 * 6400) + (($note5 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx3 * 25) + $keyswitch3))))] := %_legato_data_buffer_trans_zone_volume_offset[($note5 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx3 * 25) + $keyswitch3)]
        inc($keyswitch3)
      end while
      inc($subarticulation_idx3)
    end while
    inc($note5)
  end while
  $instrument3 := 0
  while($instrument3 <= 127) 
    %_legato_data_all_transitions_volume_curve[($result7 * 4096) + (($transition0 * 512) + (($layer0 * 128) + $instrument3))] := %legato_data_buffer_all_transitions_volume_curve[$instrument3]
    inc($instrument3)
  end while
end function
function editor_page_close
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  if($selected_subarticulation >= 0)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_parameters), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
  else
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_overview), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
  end if
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_title), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browse), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browse), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "btn_ks_browse")
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_page), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
end function

function update_mixer_eq
  $btn_mixer_eq_disable_input := $btn_mixer_eq_title
  $i2800 := abs(sh_right(abs($btn_mixer_eq_title) - 1, 31))
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_mixer_eq_disable_input), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, %Utils__hide_state[$i2800])
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($sli_mixer_eq_low), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "knb_small" & !Utils__disabled_assets[abs(sh_right(abs($btn_mixer_eq_title) - 1, 31))])
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($sli_mixer_eq_mid), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "knb_small" & !Utils__disabled_assets[abs(sh_right(abs($btn_mixer_eq_title) - 1, 31))])
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($sli_mixer_eq_high), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "knb_small" & !Utils__disabled_assets[abs(sh_right(abs($btn_mixer_eq_title) - 1, 31))])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_mixer_eq_low), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %BrowserFont__button[$btn_mixer_eq_title])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_mixer_eq_mid), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %BrowserFont__button[$btn_mixer_eq_title])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_mixer_eq_high), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %BrowserFont__button[$btn_mixer_eq_title])
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_BYPASS, abs(sh_right(abs($btn_mixer_eq_title) - 1, 31)), -1, 1, $NI_MAIN_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_GAIN1, get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_mixer_eq_low), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE), -1, 1, $NI_MAIN_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_GAIN2, get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_mixer_eq_mid), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE), -1, 1, $NI_MAIN_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_GAIN3, get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_mixer_eq_high), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE), -1, 1, $NI_MAIN_BUS)
end function

  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_browser_return), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, %Utils__hide_state[abs(sh_right(abs((- sh_right(abs(get_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_main_buttons), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) - $HIDE_PART_NOTHING) - 1, 31) .or. - sh_right(abs(get_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_settings), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) - $HIDE_PART_NOTHING) - 1, 31)) .or. - sh_right(abs(get_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_credits), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) - $HIDE_PART_NOTHING) - 1, 31)) - 1, 31))])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_settings_return), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, %Utils__hide_state[abs(sh_right(abs((- sh_right(abs(get_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_main_buttons), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) - $HIDE_PART_NOTHING) - 1, 31) .or. - sh_right(abs(get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_browser_return), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) - $HIDE_PART_NOTHING) - 1, 31)) .or. - sh_right(abs(get_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_credits), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) - $HIDE_PART_NOTHING) - 1, 31)) - 1, 31))])

  call credits_close
