end function
function toggle_con_sordino
  $RETURN_FLAG100 := 0
  while($RETURN_FLAG100 <= 4) 
    set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_BYPASS, abs(sh_right(abs($RETURN_FLAG20) - 1, 31)), -1, 0, $RETURN_FLAG100 + $NI_BUS_OFFSET)
    message("Con Sordino: " & $RETURN_FLAG20 & " for channel " & $RETURN_FLAG100)
    inc($RETURN_FLAG100)
  end while
end function
function move_to_legato_buffer
  $layer0 := 0
  $transition0 := 0
  $result7 := 0
  $note5 := 0
  while($note5 <= 1) 
    $layer0 := 0
    while($layer0 <= 127) 
      $transition0 := 0
      while($transition0 <= 24) 
        %_legato_data_buffer_sus_fade_in_time[($note5 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0)] := %_legato_data_sus_fade_in_time[($instrument3 * 204800) + (($keyswitch3 * 25600) + (($subarticulation_idx3 * 6400) + (($note5 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0))))]
        %_legato_data_buffer_sus_release_time[($note5 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0)] := %_legato_data_sus_release_time[($instrument3 * 204800) + (($keyswitch3 * 25600) + (($subarticulation_idx3 * 6400) + (($note5 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0))))]
        %_legato_data_buffer_sus_wait_time[($note5 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0)] := %_legato_data_sus_wait_time[($instrument3 * 204800) + (($keyswitch3 * 25600) + (($subarticulation_idx3 * 6400) + (($note5 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0))))]
        %_legato_data_buffer_trans_fade_in_time[($note5 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0)] := %_legato_data_trans_fade_in_time[($instrument3 * 204800) + (($keyswitch3 * 25600) + (($subarticulation_idx3 * 6400) + (($note5 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0))))]
        %_legato_data_buffer_trans_fade_out_time[($note5 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0)] := %_legato_data_trans_fade_out_time[($instrument3 * 204800) + (($keyswitch3 * 25600) + (($subarticulation_idx3 * 6400) + (($note5 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0))))]
        %_legato_data_buffer_trans_zone_start[($note5 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0)] := %_legato_data_trans_zone_start[($instrument3 * 204800) + (($keyswitch3 * 25600) + (($subarticulation_idx3 * 6400) + (($note5 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0))))]
        %_legato_data_buffer_trans_zone_volume[($note5 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0)] := %_legato_data_trans_zone_volume[($instrument3 * 204800) + (($keyswitch3 * 25600) + (($subarticulation_idx3 * 6400) + (($note5 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0))))]
        %_legato_data_buffer_sus_fade_in_time_offset[($note5 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0)] := %_legato_data_sus_fade_in_time_offset[($instrument3 * 204800) + (($keyswitch3 * 25600) + (($subarticulation_idx3 * 6400) + (($note5 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0))))]
        %_legato_data_buffer_sus_release_time_offset[($note5 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0)] := %_legato_data_sus_release_time_offset[($instrument3 * 204800) + (($keyswitch3 * 25600) + (($subarticulation_idx3 * 6400) + (($note5 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0))))]
        %_legato_data_buffer_sus_wait_time_offset[($note5 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0)] := %_legato_data_sus_wait_time_offset[($instrument3 * 204800) + (($keyswitch3 * 25600) + (($subarticulation_idx3 * 6400) + (($note5 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0))))]
        %_legato_data_buffer_trans_fade_in_time_offset[($note5 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0)] := %_legato_data_trans_fade_in_time_offset[($instrument3 * 204800) + (($keyswitch3 * 25600) + (($subarticulation_idx3 * 6400) + (($note5 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0))))]
        %_legato_data_buffer_trans_fade_out_time_offset[($note5 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0)] := %_legato_data_trans_fade_out_time_offset[($instrument3 * 204800) + (($keyswitch3 * 25600) + (($subarticulation_idx3 * 6400) + (($note5 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0))))]
        %_legato_data_buffer_trans_zone_start_offset[($note5 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0)] := %_legato_data_trans_zone_start_offset[($instrument3 * 204800) + (($keyswitch3 * 25600) + (($subarticulation_idx3 * 6400) + (($note5 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0))))]
        %_legato_data_buffer_trans_zone_volume_offset[($note5 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0)] := %_legato_data_trans_zone_volume_offset[($instrument3 * 204800) + (($keyswitch3 * 25600) + (($subarticulation_idx3 * 6400) + (($note5 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0))))]
        inc($transition0)
      end while
      inc($layer0)
    end while
    inc($note5)
  end while
  $result7 := 0
  while($result7 <= 127) 
    %legato_data_buffer_all_transitions_volume_curve[$result7] := %_legato_data_all_transitions_volume_curve[($instrument3 * 4096) + (($keyswitch3 * 512) + (($subarticulation_idx3 * 128) + $result7))]
    inc($result7)
  end while
end function
function Browser____find_preset
  $rr0 := 0
  while($rr0 = 0) 
    $_iter9017 := 0
    while(($_iter9017 = 0) and ($rr0 = 0)) 
      $_iter90050 := 0
      while((($_iter90050 < %Browser____num_presets[$velocity0]) and ($_iter9017 = 0)) and ($rr0 = 0)) 
        $_iter90023 := %_Browser____presets[($velocity0 * 1499) + $_iter90050]
        $set_articulation_event_id00 := $_iter90023
        $articulation_event_id50 := 1
        call Preset______incr__
        if(%Preset____id[$_iter90023] = $interval0)
          $note6 := $_iter90023
          $rr0 := 1
          continue
          $_iter9017 := 1
          continue
        end if
        inc($_iter90050)
      end while
      if($rr0 = 1)
        continue
      end if
      if($_iter9017 = 1)
        continue
      end if
      $note6 := -1
      $rr0 := 1
      continue
      $_iter9017 := 1
      continue
    end while
    if($rr0 = 1)
      continue
    end if
  end while
end function
function set_current_keyswitch_preset
  $trigger_clear0000 := %_keyswitch_preset[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]
  $i26000 := 1
  call Preset______decr__
  %_keyswitch_preset[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] := $result8
  $set_articulation_event_id00 := %_keyswitch_preset[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]
  $articulation_event_id50 := 1
  call Preset______incr__
end function
function set_current_articulation_name
  !_articulation_names[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] := @name2
end function
function find_loaded_legato
  $authoring_page_active := 0
  if(%_loaded_subarticulations[0] # -1)
    if(%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[0]]] = 2)
      $authoring_page_active := 1
      set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_authoring_legato_title), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !subarticulations_full_name[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[0]]] & " (" & %_loaded_subarticulations[0] & ")")
    end if
  end if
end function
function authoring_open
  call find_loaded_legato
  $i26100 := 60
  $is_active0100 := 60
  $_ret33000 := 0
  call update_authoring_transition
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_authoring), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
  $instrument10 := 0
  while($instrument10 <= 127) 
    %tbl_authoring_transition_volume_curve[$instrument10] := %_legato_data_all_transitions_volume_curve[$instrument10]
    inc($instrument10)
  end while
end function
function keyswitch_name_edit_show
  @txt_keyswitch_name := !_articulation_names[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_keyswitch_name_edit), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, %Utils__hide_state[$allow_repetitions0])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_keyswitch_name), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, %Utils__hide_state[abs(sh_right(abs($allow_repetitions0) - 1, 31))])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_keyswitch_name_edit), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, $allow_repetitions0)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_keyswitch_name_edit), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, %Utils__hide_state[abs(sh_right(abs($allow_repetitions0) - 1, 31))])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_keyswitch_browse), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, %Utils__hide_state[abs(sh_right(abs($allow_repetitions0) - 1, 31))])
end function
function update_keyswitch_volume_curve
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_keyswitch_volume_curve_min), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_keyswitch_volume_curve_max), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_keyswitch_volume_curve), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] * -1)
  $i := 0
  while($i <= (num_elements(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope) - 1)) 
    set_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, int(round(real(int((real(%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]) / 127.) * 50.)) + (real(int((real(%_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]) / 127.) * 50.) - int((real(%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]) / 127.) * 50.)) * pow(real($i) / real(num_elements(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope)), (real(%_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]) / 100.) + 1.)))))
    set_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_line), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) - get_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT))
    inc($i)
  end while
end function
function update_subarticulation_selection
  $i311 := $selected_subarticulation
  $iii2 := 0
  while($iii2 <= (num_elements(%btn_edit_subarticulation_selection) - 1)) 
    if($iii2 # $i311)
      set_control_par(%btn_edit_subarticulation_selection[$iii2], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
    else
      set_control_par(%btn_edit_subarticulation_selection[$iii2], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
    end if
    inc($iii2)
  end while
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_overview), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  if(get_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) = $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_parameters), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
  end if
  if($selected_subarticulation >= 0)
    $displayed_subarticulation := $selected_subarticulation
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_edit_subarticulation_selection_all), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
    if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] # -1)
      set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_title), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "    " & !subarticulations_full_name[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]]])
    else
      set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_title), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "    Empty")
    end if
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_solo_subarticulation), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_subarticulations_solo_states[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_mute_subarticulation), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_subarticulations_mute_states[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_layer_selection), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, $selected_subarticulation)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_volume), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_loaded_subarticulations_volume[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
  else
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_edit_subarticulation_selection_all), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_layer_selection), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, 4)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_parameters), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_overview), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    $i := 0
    while($i <= (num_elements(%btn_editor_overview) - 1)) 
      if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $i)] # -1)
        set_control_par_str(%btn_editor_overview[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "         " & !subarticulations_full_name[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $i)]]])
        set_control_par(%btn_editor_overview[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %fonts_regular_white[0])
      else
        set_control_par_str(%btn_editor_overview[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "         Empty")
        set_control_par(%btn_editor_overview[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %fonts_regular_white[6])
      end if
      inc($i)
    end while
  end if
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_tightness), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_tightness), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($mnu_subarticulation_repetition_speed), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_repetition_speed_title), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($mnu_subarticulation_rr_mode), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_rr_mode_title), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_trans_volume), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_trans_volume), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_trans_speed), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_trans_speed), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_trans_speed), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_trans_speed_blocker), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  if($selected_subarticulation >= 0)
    if((%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]]] = 0) or (%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]]] = 5))
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_tightness), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_loaded_subarticulations_tightness[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_tightness), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_tightness), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      $mnu_subarticulation_rr_mode := %_loaded_subarticulations_rr_mode[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($mnu_subarticulation_rr_mode), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_rr_mode_title), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    end if
    if(((%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]]] = 0) or (%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]]] = 5)) or (%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]]] = 9))
      $mnu_subarticulation_repetition_speed := %_loaded_subarticulations_repetition_speed[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($mnu_subarticulation_repetition_speed), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_repetition_speed_title), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    end if
    if((%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]]] = 2) or (%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]]] = 9))
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_trans_volume), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_loaded_subarticulations_trans_volume[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_trans_volume), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_trans_volume), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_trans_speed), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_loaded_subarticulations_trans_speed[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_trans_speed), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_trans_speed), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      $btn_subarticulation_trans_speed := %_loaded_subarticulations_trans_speed_auto[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_trans_speed), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      if($btn_subarticulation_trans_speed = 1)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_trans_speed_blocker), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      end if
    end if
  end if
  $i := 0
  while($i <= 3) 
    set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_left[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_right[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $i)] # -1)
      set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      if($i = $selected_subarticulation)
        set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_left[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
        set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_right[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      end if
      $note10 := %_loaded_subarticulations_start[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $i)]
      $rr1 := %_loaded_subarticulations_end[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $i)]
      $allow_repetitions0 := int(round((real($note10) / 127.) * real(31 + (sh_right($note10 - 32, 31) + 1))))
      $subarticulation_event0 := int((real($rr1) / 127.) * 31.)
      set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, %center_circles_frame_sums[$allow_repetitions0] + $subarticulation_event0)
      set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_left[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, $note10)
      set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_right[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, $rr1)
    end if
    inc($i)
  end while
  if($selected_subarticulation >= 0)
    ?xy_modwheel_assignment[2] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_start[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
    ?xy_modwheel_assignment[0] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_start[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] + %_loaded_subarticulations_fade_in[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
    ?xy_modwheel_assignment[4] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_end[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] - %_loaded_subarticulations_fade_out[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
    ?xy_modwheel_assignment[6] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_end[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_constant), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int((?xy_modwheel_assignment[0] - ?xy_modwheel_assignment[2]) * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH))))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_constant), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, int((?xy_modwheel_assignment[4] - ?xy_modwheel_assignment[0]) * 225.))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int(?xy_modwheel_assignment[2] * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH))))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_left_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - 10)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_fade_in), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_constant), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - 225)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_fade_in), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, int((?xy_modwheel_assignment[0] - ?xy_modwheel_assignment[2]) * 224.))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_fade_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_constant), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_constant), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_fade_out), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, int((?xy_modwheel_assignment[6] - ?xy_modwheel_assignment[4]) * 224.))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_right), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int(?xy_modwheel_assignment[6] * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)))) - 1)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_right_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_right), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 1)
  end if
  ?xy_dynamic_range[0] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_lower[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
  ?xy_dynamic_range[2] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_upper[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int(?xy_dynamic_range[0] * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH))))
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - 10)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_right), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int(?xy_dynamic_range[2] * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)))) - 1)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_right_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_right), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 1)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_right), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
  $idx37 := int((real(%modulation_positions[0]) * (1. - (real($polyphonic_modulation_percentage) / 100.))) + ((real(%modulation_positions[0]) * real($polyphonic_modulation_percentage)) / 100.))
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_cursor), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - 1) + int((real((($idx37 * (1 + (sh_right(127 - $idx37, 31) .or. sh_right($idx37 - 1, 31)))) - sh_right($idx37 - 1, 31)) - (127 * sh_right(127 - $idx37, 31))) / 127.) * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_right), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))))
  if(get_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) = $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_parameters), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_overview), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browse), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
    set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browse), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "btn_back")
    $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset := 0
    if($selected_subarticulation < 0)
      $selected_subarticulation := 0
      $btn_edit_subarticulation_selection_all := 0
      $i311 := 0
      $iii2 := 0
      while($iii2 <= (num_elements(%btn_edit_subarticulation_selection) - 1)) 
        if($iii2 # $i311)
          set_control_par(%btn_edit_subarticulation_selection[$iii2], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
        else
          set_control_par(%btn_edit_subarticulation_selection[$iii2], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
        end if
        inc($iii2)
      end while
    end if
    if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] # -1)
      $instrument_slot4 := %type_to_category[%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]]]]
      $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset := 0
      $selected_category := $instrument_slot4
      $keyswitch15 := 0
      while($keyswitch15 <= (num_elements(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category) - 1)) 
        if($keyswitch15 = $instrument_slot4)
          set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category[$keyswitch15], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
        else
          set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category[$keyswitch15], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
        end if
        inc($keyswitch15)
      end while
      $note15 := 0
      $keyswitch15 := 0
      while($keyswitch15 <= 31) 
        if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($instrument_slot4 * 32) + $keyswitch15)] # -1)
          if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($instrument_slot4 * 32) + $keyswitch15)] = %_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
            $note15 := $keyswitch15
          end if
        else
          $subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries := $keyswitch15
          $keyswitch15 := 32
        end if
        inc($keyswitch15)
      end while
      message("selected_idx: " & $note15 & ", subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries: " & ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))
      if($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries <= 8)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
        $note15 := 0
      else
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, int(195. / (real($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries) / 8.)))
        $note15 := $note15 - (($note15 - ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8)) .and. sh_right(($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8) - $note15, 31))
      end if
      $subarticulation_browser_active_category := $instrument_slot4
      $subarticulation_event_id9 := $note15
      $subarticulation1 := 195 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT)
      $sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar := - (- ($subarticulation1 - (($subarticulation_event_id9 * $subarticulation1) / ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))) .and. sh_right(- ($subarticulation1 - (($subarticulation_event_id9 * $subarticulation1) / ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))), 31))
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, 160 + ((abs($subarticulation1 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)) * (195 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT))) / $subarticulation1))
      $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset := (abs($subarticulation1 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)) * ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8)) / $subarticulation1
      $i := 0
      while($i <= (num_elements(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection) - 1)) 
        set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
        if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))] # -1)
          set_control_par_str(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !subarticulations_full_name[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))]]])
          if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))] = %_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
            set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
          else
            set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
          end if
          set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
        end if
        inc($i)
      end while
      message("set scroll slider: " & $note15)
      if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] = -1)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browser_empty), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
      else
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browser_empty), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
      end if
    else
      $instrument_slot4 := 0
      $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset := 0
      $selected_category := 0
      $keyswitch15 := 0
      while($keyswitch15 <= (num_elements(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category) - 1)) 
        if($keyswitch15 = $instrument_slot4)
          set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category[$keyswitch15], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
        else
          set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category[$keyswitch15], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
        end if
        inc($keyswitch15)
      end while
      $note15 := 0
      $keyswitch15 := 0
      while($keyswitch15 <= 31) 
        if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($instrument_slot4 * 32) + $keyswitch15)] # -1)
          if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($instrument_slot4 * 32) + $keyswitch15)] = %_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
            $note15 := $keyswitch15
          end if
        else
          $subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries := $keyswitch15
          $keyswitch15 := 32
        end if
        inc($keyswitch15)
      end while
      message("selected_idx: " & $note15 & ", subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries: " & ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))
      if($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries <= 8)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
        $note15 := 0
      else
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, int(195. / (real($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries) / 8.)))
        $note15 := $note15 - (($note15 - ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8)) .and. sh_right(($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8) - $note15, 31))
      end if
      $subarticulation_browser_active_category := $instrument_slot4
      $subarticulation_event_id9 := $note15
      $subarticulation1 := 195 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT)
      $sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar := - (- ($subarticulation1 - (($subarticulation_event_id9 * $subarticulation1) / ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))) .and. sh_right(- ($subarticulation1 - (($subarticulation_event_id9 * $subarticulation1) / ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))), 31))
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, 160 + ((abs($subarticulation1 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)) * (195 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT))) / $subarticulation1))
      $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset := (abs($subarticulation1 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)) * ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8)) / $subarticulation1
      $i := 0
      while($i <= (num_elements(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection) - 1)) 
        set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
        if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))] # -1)
          set_control_par_str(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !subarticulations_full_name[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))]]])
          if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))] = %_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
            set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
          else
            set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
          end if
          set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
        end if
        inc($i)
      end while
      message("set scroll slider: " & $note15)
      if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] = -1)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browser_empty), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
      else
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browser_empty), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
      end if
    end if
  end if
end function
function subarticulation_browser_open
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_parameters), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_overview), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browse), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browse), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "btn_back")
  $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset := 0
  if($selected_subarticulation < 0)
    $selected_subarticulation := 0
    $btn_edit_subarticulation_selection_all := 0
    $i311 := 0
    $iii2 := 0
    while($iii2 <= (num_elements(%btn_edit_subarticulation_selection) - 1)) 
      if($iii2 # $i311)
        set_control_par(%btn_edit_subarticulation_selection[$iii2], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
      else
        set_control_par(%btn_edit_subarticulation_selection[$iii2], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
      end if
      inc($iii2)
    end while
  end if
  if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] # -1)
    $instrument_slot4 := %type_to_category[%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]]]]
    $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset := 0
    $selected_category := $instrument_slot4
    $keyswitch15 := 0
    while($keyswitch15 <= (num_elements(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category) - 1)) 
      if($keyswitch15 = $instrument_slot4)
        set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category[$keyswitch15], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
      else
        set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category[$keyswitch15], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
      end if
      inc($keyswitch15)
    end while
    $note15 := 0
    $keyswitch15 := 0
    while($keyswitch15 <= 31) 
      if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($instrument_slot4 * 32) + $keyswitch15)] # -1)
        if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($instrument_slot4 * 32) + $keyswitch15)] = %_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
          $note15 := $keyswitch15
        end if
      else
        $subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries := $keyswitch15
        $keyswitch15 := 32
      end if
      inc($keyswitch15)
    end while
    message("selected_idx: " & $note15 & ", subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries: " & ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))
    if($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries <= 8)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
      $note15 := 0
    else
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, int(195. / (real($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries) / 8.)))
      $note15 := $note15 - (($note15 - ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8)) .and. sh_right(($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8) - $note15, 31))
    end if
    $subarticulation_browser_active_category := $instrument_slot4
    $subarticulation_event_id9 := $note15
    $subarticulation1 := 195 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT)
    $sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar := - (- ($subarticulation1 - (($subarticulation_event_id9 * $subarticulation1) / ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))) .and. sh_right(- ($subarticulation1 - (($subarticulation_event_id9 * $subarticulation1) / ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))), 31))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, 160 + ((abs($subarticulation1 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)) * (195 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT))) / $subarticulation1))
    $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset := (abs($subarticulation1 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)) * ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8)) / $subarticulation1
    $i := 0
    while($i <= (num_elements(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection) - 1)) 
      set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
      if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))] # -1)
        set_control_par_str(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !subarticulations_full_name[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))]]])
        if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))] = %_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
          set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
        else
          set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
        end if
        set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      end if
      inc($i)
    end while
    message("set scroll slider: " & $note15)
    if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] = -1)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browser_empty), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
    else
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browser_empty), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
    end if
  else
    $instrument_slot4 := 0
    $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset := 0
    $selected_category := 0
    $keyswitch15 := 0
    while($keyswitch15 <= (num_elements(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category) - 1)) 
      if($keyswitch15 = $instrument_slot4)
        set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category[$keyswitch15], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
      else
        set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category[$keyswitch15], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
      end if
      inc($keyswitch15)
    end while
    $note15 := 0
    $keyswitch15 := 0
    while($keyswitch15 <= 31) 
      if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($instrument_slot4 * 32) + $keyswitch15)] # -1)
        if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($instrument_slot4 * 32) + $keyswitch15)] = %_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
          $note15 := $keyswitch15
        end if
      else
        $subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries := $keyswitch15
        $keyswitch15 := 32
      end if
      inc($keyswitch15)
    end while
    message("selected_idx: " & $note15 & ", subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries: " & ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))
    if($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries <= 8)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
      $note15 := 0
    else
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, int(195. / (real($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries) / 8.)))
      $note15 := $note15 - (($note15 - ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8)) .and. sh_right(($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8) - $note15, 31))
    end if
    $subarticulation_browser_active_category := $instrument_slot4
    $subarticulation_event_id9 := $note15
    $subarticulation1 := 195 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT)
    $sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar := - (- ($subarticulation1 - (($subarticulation_event_id9 * $subarticulation1) / ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))) .and. sh_right(- ($subarticulation1 - (($subarticulation_event_id9 * $subarticulation1) / ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))), 31))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, 160 + ((abs($subarticulation1 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)) * (195 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT))) / $subarticulation1))
    $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset := (abs($subarticulation1 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)) * ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8)) / $subarticulation1
    $i := 0
    while($i <= (num_elements(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection) - 1)) 
      set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
      if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))] # -1)
        set_control_par_str(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !subarticulations_full_name[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))]]])
        if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))] = %_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
          set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
        else
          set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
        end if
        set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      end if
      inc($i)
    end while
    message("set scroll slider: " & $note15)
    if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] = -1)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browser_empty), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
    else
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browser_empty), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
    end if
  end if
end function
function update_modwheel_assignment_control
  if($selected_subarticulation >= 0)
    ?xy_modwheel_assignment[2] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_start[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
    ?xy_modwheel_assignment[0] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_start[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] + %_loaded_subarticulations_fade_in[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
    ?xy_modwheel_assignment[4] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_end[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] - %_loaded_subarticulations_fade_out[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
    ?xy_modwheel_assignment[6] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_end[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_constant), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int((?xy_modwheel_assignment[0] - ?xy_modwheel_assignment[2]) * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH))))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_constant), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, int((?xy_modwheel_assignment[4] - ?xy_modwheel_assignment[0]) * 225.))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int(?xy_modwheel_assignment[2] * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH))))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_left_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - 10)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_fade_in), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_constant), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - 225)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_fade_in), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, int((?xy_modwheel_assignment[0] - ?xy_modwheel_assignment[2]) * 224.))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_fade_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_constant), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_constant), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_fade_out), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, int((?xy_modwheel_assignment[6] - ?xy_modwheel_assignment[4]) * 224.))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_right), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int(?xy_modwheel_assignment[6] * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)))) - 1)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_right_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_right), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 1)
  end if
end function
function update_modwheel_assignment_circles
  $i := 0
  while($i <= 3) 
    set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_left[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_right[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $i)] # -1)
      set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      if($i = $selected_subarticulation)
        set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_left[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
        set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_right[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      end if
      $note10 := %_loaded_subarticulations_start[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $i)]
      $rr1 := %_loaded_subarticulations_end[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $i)]
      $allow_repetitions0 := int(round((real($note10) / 127.) * real(31 + (sh_right($note10 - 32, 31) + 1))))
      $subarticulation_event0 := int((real($rr1) / 127.) * 31.)
      set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, %center_circles_frame_sums[$allow_repetitions0] + $subarticulation_event0)
      set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_left[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, $note10)
      set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_right[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, $rr1)
    end if
    inc($i)
  end while
end function
function update_dynamic_range_control
  ?xy_dynamic_range[0] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_lower[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
  ?xy_dynamic_range[2] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_upper[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int(?xy_dynamic_range[0] * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH))))
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - 10)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_right), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int(?xy_dynamic_range[2] * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)))) - 1)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_right_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_right), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 1)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_right), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
  $idx37 := int((real(%modulation_positions[0]) * (1. - (real($polyphonic_modulation_percentage) / 100.))) + ((real(%modulation_positions[0]) * real($polyphonic_modulation_percentage)) / 100.))
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_cursor), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - 1) + int((real((($idx37 * (1 + (sh_right(127 - $idx37, 31) .or. sh_right($idx37 - 1, 31)))) - sh_right($idx37 - 1, 31)) - (127 * sh_right(127 - $idx37, 31))) / 127.) * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_right), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))))
end function
function center_circle_distance
  ~fade_level00 := ~fade_level0 - 0.5
  ~weight0 := ~subarticulation_modulation_strength00 - 0.5
  ~subarticulation_modulation_strength000 := sqrt((~fade_level00 * ~fade_level00) + (~weight0 * ~weight0))
end function
function center_circle_angle
  ~fade_level0 := ~fade_level00 - 0.5
  ~subarticulation_modulation_strength000 := ~subarticulation_modulation_strength00 - 0.5
  ~subarticulation_modulation_strength001 := ~fade_level0 / sqrt((~fade_level0 * ~fade_level0) + (~subarticulation_modulation_strength000 * ~subarticulation_modulation_strength000))
  ~fade_level01 := acos(~subarticulation_modulation_strength001)
  if(~subarticulation_modulation_strength000 < 0.)
    ~fade_level01 := (2. * ~NI_MATH_PI) - ~fade_level01
  end if
  ~weight0 := ~fade_level01
end function
function angle_to_value
  ~fade_level0 := ~fade_level01 + (~NI_MATH_PI / 2.)
  if(~fade_level0 > (~NI_MATH_PI * 2.))
    ~fade_level0 := ~fade_level0 - (2. * ~NI_MATH_PI)
  end if
  ~fade_level0 := abs(~fade_level0 - (2. * ~NI_MATH_PI))
  $allow_repetitions0 := int((127. * (~fade_level0 - ~subarticulation_modulation_strength001)) / (~subarticulation_modulation_strength000 - ~subarticulation_modulation_strength001))
end function
function update_keyswitch_settings
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_keyswitch_name), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !_articulation_names[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_editor_keyswitch_icon), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, %_articulation_icon[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_keyswitch_volume_curve_min), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_keyswitch_volume_curve_max), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_keyswitch_volume_curve), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] * -1)
  $i := 0
  while($i <= (num_elements(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope) - 1)) 
    set_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, int(round(real(int((real(%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]) / 127.) * 50.)) + (real(int((real(%_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]) / 127.) * 50.) - int((real(%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]) / 127.) * 50.)) * pow(real($i) / real(num_elements(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope)), (real(%_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]) / 100.) + 1.)))))
    set_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_line), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) - get_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT))
    inc($i)
  end while
end function
function update_cc_slider_visibility
  if($use_expression = 1)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_expression_slider), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_expression_slider), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
  else
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_expression_slider), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_expression_slider), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  end if
end function
function set_key_colors
  $instrument10 := 0
  while($instrument10 <= 127) 
    set_key_color($instrument10, $KEY_COLOR_INACTIVE)
    if(($instrument10 >= %nki_range[0]) and ($instrument10 <= %nki_range[1]))
      set_key_color($instrument10, $KEY_COLOR_BLUE)
    end if
    inc($instrument10)
  end while
  $i := 0
  while($i <= 7) 
    set_key_color(($keyswitch_octave * 12) + $i, $KEY_COLOR_RED)
    if(%_keyswitch_states[($selected_instrument * 8) + $i] = 1)
      set_key_color(($keyswitch_octave * 12) + $i, $KEY_COLOR_ORANGE)
    end if
    inc($i)
  end while
end function
function apply_scroll_offset
  $i := 0
  while($i <= (num_elements(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection) - 1)) 
    set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))] # -1)
      set_control_par_str(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !subarticulations_full_name[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))]]])
      if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))] = %_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
        set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
      else
        set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
      end if
      set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    end if
    inc($i)
  end while
end function
function Preset______init__
  $Preset____free_idx := search(%Preset____allocation, 0, $Preset____free_idx, 999999)
  if($Preset____free_idx = -1)
    message("Error: No more free space available to allocate objects of type 'Preset'")
  end if
  %Preset____allocation[$Preset____free_idx] := 1
  %Preset____id[$Preset____free_idx] := $group_count000
  !Preset____name[$Preset____free_idx] := @name2
  $is_active0 := %Preset____tags[$Preset____free_idx]
  $articulation_event_id2 := 1
  $ret18 := $is_active0
  while($ret18 # -1) 
    $string010 := 0
    %Floatmask____allocation[$ret18] := %Floatmask____allocation[$ret18] - $articulation_event_id2
    if(%Floatmask____allocation[$ret18] > 0)
      $ret18 := -1
      continue
    else
      %Floatmask____allocation[$ret18] := 0
    end if
    $is_active0 := $ret18
    $ret18 := -1
    $string010 := 0
    while($string010 <= 1) 
      $i360 := %_Floatmask____fm[($is_active0 * 2) + $string010]
      $string02 := 1
      $highest1 := $i360
      while($highest1 # -1) 
        $i2610 := 0
        %Bitlist____allocation[$highest1] := %Bitlist____allocation[$highest1] - $string02
        if(%Bitlist____allocation[$highest1] > 0)
          $highest1 := -1
          continue
        else
          %Bitlist____allocation[$highest1] := 0
        end if
        $i360 := $highest1
        $highest1 := -1
        $i350 := $i360
        $i3400 := 0
        if($i350 # -1)
          %Bitlist____val[$i350] := 0
          $Bitlist____free_idx := (($Bitlist____free_idx + $i350) - abs($Bitlist____free_idx - $i350)) / 2
        end if
      end while
      inc($string010)
    end while
    $i26 := $is_active0
    $trigger_clear0 := 0
    if($i26 # -1)
      $_iter18 := 0
      while($_iter18 <= 1) 
        %_Floatmask____fm[($i26 * 2) + $_iter18] := -1
        inc($_iter18)
      end while
      $Floatmask____free_idx := (($Floatmask____free_idx + $i26) - abs($Floatmask____free_idx - $i26)) / 2
    end if
  end while
  %Preset____tags[$Preset____free_idx] := $trigger_clear0100
  $ii40 := %Preset____tags[$Preset____free_idx]
  $i370 := 1
  if($ii40 # -1)
    %Floatmask____allocation[$ii40] := %Floatmask____allocation[$ii40] + $i370
  end if
  %Preset____icon[$Preset____free_idx] := $ii6
  !Preset____file[$Preset____free_idx] := @_ret1050
  %Preset____deleted[$Preset____free_idx] := $articulation_event_is_empty0
  $ii8 := $Preset____free_idx
end function

function dev_keys__get_preset_path

      continue
    end if
  end while
end function

function Scrollarea__is_idx_on_sight

    end if
  end while
end function
function Categories____get_tag_category

        $current0020 := $_ret810

        continue
      end if
      inc($cat0)
      inc($_ret810)
    end while
    if($ret460 = 1)
      continue
    end if
    $current0020 := -1
    $ret460 := 1
    continue
  end while
end function

    end if

end on

  if($mnu_authoring_edit_all > 0)
    $result12000 := ((abs(sh_right(abs(- sh_right(abs($mnu_authoring_edit_all - 2) - 1, 31)) - 1, 31)) * $mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer) * 128) * 25
    $transition_type200 := ((($mnu_authoring_edit_all + (abs(sh_right(abs(- sh_right(abs($mnu_authoring_edit_all - 2) - 1, 31)) - 1, 31)) * $mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer)) * 128) * 25) - 1
    $i := $result12000
    while($i <= $transition_type200) 
      %_legato_data_sus_release_time[$i] := $sli_sustain_release
      inc($i)
    end while
  else
    %_legato_data_sus_release_time[($mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer * 3200) + (($vlue_authoring_start_note * 25) + (abs($vlue_authoring_end_note - $vlue_authoring_start_note) + (- sh_right(- ($vlue_authoring_end_note - $vlue_authoring_start_note), 31) * 12)))] := $sli_sustain_release
  end if
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_sustain_release), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, $sli_sustain_release & " + " & $sli_sustain_release_offset & " ms")
end on
on ui_control($sli_sustain_release_offset)
  $sli_sustain_release_offset := (($sli_sustain_release_offset * (1 + (sh_right((get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_sustain_release), $CONTROL_PAR_MAX_VALUE) - $sli_sustain_release) - $sli_sustain_release_offset, 31) .or. sh_right($sli_sustain_release_offset - - $sli_sustain_release, 31)))) - (- $sli_sustain_release * sh_right($sli_sustain_release_offset - - $sli_sustain_release, 31))) - ((get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_sustain_release), $CONTROL_PAR_MAX_VALUE) - $sli_sustain_release) * sh_right((get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_sustain_release), $CONTROL_PAR_MAX_VALUE) - $sli_sustain_release) - $sli_sustain_release_offset, 31))
  if($mnu_authoring_edit_all > 0)
    $transition_type200 := ((abs(sh_right(abs(- sh_right(abs($mnu_authoring_edit_all - 2) - 1, 31)) - 1, 31)) * $mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer) * 128) * 25
    $result12000 := ((($mnu_authoring_edit_all + (abs(sh_right(abs(- sh_right(abs($mnu_authoring_edit_all - 2) - 1, 31)) - 1, 31)) * $mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer)) * 128) * 25) - 1
    $i := $transition_type200
    while($i <= $result12000) 
      %_legato_data_sus_release_time_offset[$i] := $sli_sustain_release_offset
      inc($i)
    end while
  else
    %_legato_data_sus_release_time_offset[($mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer * 3200) + (($vlue_authoring_start_note * 25) + (abs($vlue_authoring_end_note - $vlue_authoring_start_note) + (- sh_right(- ($vlue_authoring_end_note - $vlue_authoring_start_note), 31) * 12)))] := $sli_sustain_release_offset
  end if

on ui_control($btn_save_authoring)
  if($authoring_page_active = 1)
    $instrument3 := 0
    $keyswitch3 := 0
    $subarticulation_idx3 := 0
    call move_to_legato_buffer
    @name2 := "leg" & %_loaded_subarticulations[0]
    save_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_sus_fade_in_time, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & @name2 & "_sus_fade_in_time.nka")
    save_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_sus_release_time, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & @name2 & "_sus_release_time.nka")
    save_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_sus_wait_time, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & @name2 & "_sus_wait_time.nka")

on ui_control($btn_authoring_smooth_table)
  $transition_type200 := 0
  $i2501001 := 0
  $result12000 := 0
  while($result12000 <= 127) 
    if($result12000 > 0)
      $transition_type200 := %tbl_authoring_transition_volume_curve[$result12000 - 1]
    else
      $transition_type200 := %tbl_authoring_transition_volume_curve[0]
    end if
    if($result12000 < 127)
      $i2501001 := %tbl_authoring_transition_volume_curve[$result12000 + 1]
    else
      $i2501001 := %tbl_authoring_transition_volume_curve[127]
    end if
    %tbl_authoring_transition_volume_curve[$result12000] := (((%tbl_authoring_transition_volume_curve[$result12000] * 2) + $transition_type200) + $i2501001) / 4
    %_legato_data_all_transitions_volume_curve[$result12000] := %tbl_authoring_transition_volume_curve[$result12000]
    inc($result12000)
  end while
  $btn_authoring_smooth_table := 0
end on

  end if

    if(%subarticulations_ids[$i40] >= 0)
      if(%subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%subarticulations_ids[$i40]]] # $NI_NOT_FOUND)
        if(%subarticulation_is_loaded0[%subarticulations_ids[$i40]] > 0)
          $lowest00 := %subarticulations_ids[$i40]
          $highest1 := 1
          $i := 0
          $ks00 := $lowest00
          call subarticulation_group_count
          $lowest1 := $s00
          while($i <= ($lowest1 - 1)) 
            purge_group((%subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$lowest00]] + $i) + 1, $highest1 * %microphone_position_states[$i mod 6])
            inc($i)
            $ks00 := $lowest00
            call subarticulation_group_count
            $lowest1 := $s00
          end while
          $i311 := $lowest1
        end if
      end if
    end if
    inc($i40)
  end while
end on
on ui_control($btn_show_authoring_tools)
  if($btn_show_authoring_tools = 1)
    call authoring_open
  else
    call authoring_close
  end if
end on
on ui_control($btn_dev_reload_all_legatos)
  $_iter0 := 0
  while($_iter0 <= (num_elements(%inst5) - 1)) 
    %inst5[$_iter0] := 0
    inc($_iter0)
  end while
  %inst5[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  while(%inst5[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] < 1) 
    $_iter0 := 0
    while($_iter0 <= (num_elements(%repeat1) - 1)) 
      %repeat1[$_iter0] := 0
      inc($_iter0)
    end while
    %repeat1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
    while(%repeat1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] < 8) 
      $_iter0 := 0
      while($_iter0 <= (num_elements(%k0) - 1)) 
        %k0[$_iter0] := 0
        inc($_iter0)
      end while
      %k0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
      while(%k0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] < 4) 
        if(%_loaded_subarticulations[(%inst5[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 32) + ((%repeat1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 4) + %k0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])] >= 0)
          if(%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[(%inst5[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 32) + ((%repeat1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 4) + %k0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])]]] = 2)
            !legato_name1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := "leg" & %_loaded_subarticulations[(%inst5[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 32) + ((%repeat1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 4) + %k0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])]
            wait_async(load_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_sus_fade_in_time, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & !legato_name1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & "_sus_fade_in_time.nka"))
            wait_async(load_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_sus_release_time, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & !legato_name1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & "_sus_release_time.nka"))
            wait_async(load_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_sus_wait_time, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & !legato_name1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & "_sus_wait_time.nka"))
            wait_async(load_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_trans_fade_in_time, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & !legato_name1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & "_sus_trans_fade_in_time.nka"))
            wait_async(load_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_trans_fade_out_time, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & !legato_name1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & "_sus_trans_fade_out_time.nka"))
            wait_async(load_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_trans_zone_start, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & !legato_name1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & "_sus_trans_zone_start.nka"))
            wait_async(load_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_trans_zone_volume, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & !legato_name1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & "_sus_trans_zone_volume.nka"))
            wait_async(load_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_sus_fade_in_time_offset, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & !legato_name1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & "_sus_fade_in_time_offset.nka"))
            wait_async(load_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_sus_release_time_offset, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & !legato_name1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & "_sus_release_time_offset.nka"))
            wait_async(load_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_sus_wait_time_offset, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & !legato_name1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & "_sus_wait_time.nka_offset"))
            wait_async(load_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_trans_fade_in_time_offset, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & !legato_name1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & "_sus_trans_fade_in_time_offset.nka"))
            wait_async(load_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_trans_fade_out_time_offset, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & !legato_name1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & "_sus_trans_fade_out_time_offset.nka"))
            wait_async(load_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_trans_zone_start_offset, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & !legato_name1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & "_sus_trans_zone_start_offset.nka"))
            wait_async(load_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_trans_zone_volume_offset, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & !legato_name1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & "_sus_trans_zone_volume_offset.nka"))
            wait_async(load_array_str(%legato_data_buffer_all_transitions_volume_curve, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & !legato_name1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & "_all_transitions_volume_curve.nka"))
            $result7 := %inst5[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
            $transition0 := %repeat1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
            $layer0 := %k0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
            call move_legato_buffer_to_instrument
            message("Reloaded Legato for Instrument: " & %inst5[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & ", Keyswitch: " & %repeat1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & ", Subarticulation: " & %k0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
          end if
        end if
        inc(%k0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
      end while
      inc(%repeat1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
    end while
    inc(%inst5[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
  end while
  $btn_dev_reload_all_legatos := 0
end on
on ui_control($btn_mixer_preset_save)
  if($btn_mixer_preset_save = 1)
    %mixer_preset_array[0] := -212121
    %mixer_preset_array[1] := 0
    %mixer_preset_array[2] := 1
    %mixer_preset_array[3] := - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)
    $fade_out_range0 := 0
    while($fade_out_range0 <= 4) 
      %mixer_preset_array[4 + $fade_out_range0] := get_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_enable[$fade_out_range0], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
      %mixer_preset_array[9 + $fade_out_range0] := get_control_par(%sli_mixer_channel_volume[$fade_out_range0], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
      %mixer_preset_array[14 + $fade_out_range0] := get_control_par(%sli_mixer_channel_pan[$fade_out_range0], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
      %mixer_preset_array[19 + $fade_out_range0] := get_control_par(%sli_mixer_channel_rev_send[$fade_out_range0], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
      %mixer_preset_array[24 + $fade_out_range0] := get_control_par(%mnu_mixer_channel_out[$fade_out_range0], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
      inc($fade_out_range0)
    end while
    %mixer_preset_array[29] := $btn_mixer_eq_title
    %mixer_preset_array[30] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_mixer_eq_low), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
    %mixer_preset_array[31] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_mixer_eq_mid), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
    %mixer_preset_array[32] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_mixer_eq_high), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
    %mixer_preset_array[33] := $btn_mixer_comp_title
    %mixer_preset_array[34] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_mixer_comp_compression), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
    %mixer_preset_array[35] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_mixer_comp_mix), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
    %mixer_preset_array[36] := $btn_mixer_rev_title
    %mixer_preset_array[37] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($mnu_mixer_rev_preset), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
    %mixer_preset_array[38] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_mixer_rev_return), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
    %mixer_preset_array[39] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_mixer_switch_bleed_channel), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
    save_array(%mixer_preset_array, 0)
    $btn_mixer_preset_save := 0
  else
    $btn_mixer_preset_save := 1
  end if
end on
on ui_control($btn_mixer_preset_load)
  if($btn_mixer_preset_load = 1)
    wait_async(load_array(%mixer_preset_array, 0))
    %abort0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
    %abort0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
    if(%mixer_preset_array[0] # -212121)
      %set_id1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := get_ui_id($lbl_mixer_preset_load_error_message)
      !legato_name1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := "This is not a valid mixer preset file."
      !unit0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
      call display_value_in_control_label
      %abort0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 1
    end if
    if(%mixer_preset_array[1] # 0)
      %set_id1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := get_ui_id($lbl_mixer_preset_load_error_message)
      !legato_name1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := "Loaded mixer preset file from incompatible product."
      !unit0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
      call display_value_in_control_label
      %abort0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 1
    end if
    if(%mixer_preset_array[2] # 1)
      %set_id1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := get_ui_id($lbl_mixer_preset_load_error_message)
      !legato_name1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := "Loaded mixer preset file has an incompatible version."

      %abort0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 1

    if(%mixer_preset_array[3] # - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31))
      %set_id1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := get_ui_id($lbl_mixer_preset_load_error_message)
      !legato_name1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := "Loaded mixer preset file has an incompatible type."

      while(%i48[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= 4)
